title: MELD: Multi-Task Equilibrated Learning Detector for AI-Generated Text
summary: Large language models are now embedded in everyday writing workflows, making reliable AI-generated text detection important for academic integrity, content moderation, and provenance tracking. In practice, however, a detector must do more than achieve high aggregate AUROC on clean, in-distribution human and AI text: it should remain robust to attacks and adversarial rewrites, transfer to unseen generators and domains, and operate at low false-positive rates (FPR). Most existing detectors optimize a single AI/Human objective, giving the representation little incentive to learn generator, attack, or domain structure once the binary task saturates. We introduce MELD (Multi-Task Equilibrated Learning Detector), a deployable detector for AI-generated text that enriches binary detection with auxiliary supervision. MELD attaches generator-family, attack-type, and source-domain heads to a shared encoder, and balances the four losses with learned homoscedastic uncertainty weights. To improve robustness, an EMA teacher predicts on clean inputs while an attack-augmented student is distilled toward the teacher. MELD further uses a hard-negative pairwise ranking loss to enlarge the score margin between AI-generated texts and the most confusable human texts. At inference, all auxiliary heads are discarded, giving MELD the same interface and cost as a standard detector. On the public RAID leaderboard, MELD is the strongest open-source detector and is competitive with leading commercial models, especially under attack and at low FPR. Across standard held-out benchmarks, MELD matches or outperforms supervised baselines. We further introduce MELD-eval, a held-out evaluation pool built from recent chat models released by four major LLM providers. Without additional finetuning, MELD achieves 99.9% TPR at 1% FPR on MELD-eval, while many baselines degrade sharply.

AI.tldr: MELD 是一个多任务均衡学习的 AI 文本检测器，通过引入生成器家族、攻击类型和源域等辅助监督头，结合 EMA 教师-学生蒸馏和难负样本排序损失，在保持推理成本不变的情况下，在 RAID 榜单和跨域基准上达到领先性能，尤其在攻击场景和低误报率下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有 AI 文本检测器通常仅优化单一的 AI/人类二元分类目标，导致表示学习在二元任务饱和后缺乏对生成器、攻击类型或源域结构的建模能力，难以同时满足对攻击和对抗改写鲁棒、跨未见生成器和域泛化以及低假阳性率运行的实用需求。
AI.method: MELD 在共享编码器上附加了生成器家族、攻击类型和源域三个辅助分类头，并通过可学习的同方差不确定性权重均衡四个损失；采用 EMA 教师网络对干净输入预测，攻击增强的学生网络向其蒸馏以提升鲁棒性；引入难负样本对排序损失扩大 AI 文本与最易混淆人类文本之间的得分间隔；推理时丢弃所有辅助头，保持与标准检测器相同的接口和计算开销。
AI.result: 在公开 RAID 榜单上，MELD 是最强的开源检测器，与领先的商业模型竞争，尤其在攻击场景和低 FPR 下表现突出；在标准跨域基准上匹配或超越监督基线；在基于四大 LLM 提供商最新聊天模型构建的 MELD-eval 评估集上，无需额外微调即可达到 99.9% TPR at 1% FPR，而多数基线性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: MELD 证明通过多任务辅助监督和均衡训练策略，可以在不增加推理成本的前提下显著提升 AI 文本检测器的泛化能力和鲁棒性，为实际部署中应对多样化攻击和域漂移提供了有效方案。

title: Cognitive Agent Compilation for Explicit Problem Solver Modeling
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used for tutoring, feedback generation, and content creation, but their broad pretraining makes them hard to constrain and poor substitutes for controllable learners. Educational systems often require inspectable and editable knowledge states: educators want to know what a system assumes the learner knows, and learners benefit when the system can justify actions in terms of explicit skills, misconceptions, and strategies. Inspired by cognitive architectures, we propose Cognitive Agent Compilation (CAC), a framework that uses a strong teacher LLM to compile problem-solving knowledge into an explicit target agent. CAC separates (i) knowledge representation, (ii) problem-solving policy, and (iii) verification and update rules, with the goal of making bounded problem solving more inspectable and editable in educational settings. We present an early proof of concept implemented with Small Language Models that surfaces key design trade-offs, particularly between explicit control and scalable generalization, and positions CAC as an initial step toward bounded-knowledge AI for educational applications.

AI.tldr: 提出认知代理编译（CAC）框架，利用强教师LLM将问题求解知识编译为显式目标代理，分离知识表示、策略与验证规则，以提高教育场景中受限问题求解的可检查性与可编辑性，并用小型语言模型验证了关键设计权衡。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型虽广泛用于教育场景，但其广泛预训练使其难以约束，且无法替代可控的学习者；教育系统需要可检查、可编辑的知识状态，使教育者能了解系统假设的学习者知识，学习者能理解系统基于显式技能、误解和策略的推理过程。
AI.method: 提出认知代理编译（CAC）框架，利用强大的教师LLM将问题求解知识编译为显式目标代理；该框架将知识表示、问题求解策略、验证与更新规则三者分离，以实现受限且可检查的推理，并使用小型语言模型构建了初步原型以探索关键设计权衡。
AI.result: 通过小型语言模型实现的早期概念验证揭示了显式控制与可扩展泛化之间的关键设计权衡，验证了CAC框架在有限范围内实现可检查性与可编辑性的可行性，但未给出具体的量化性能指标。
AI.conclusion: CAC作为迈向教育应用中受限知识AI的初步步骤，证明了将认知架构思想与LLM结合以构建显式、可检查知识代理的潜力，为未来在可控性与泛化之间寻求更好平衡的研究指明了方向。

title: MedExAgent: Training LLM Agents to Ask, Examine, and Diagnose in Noisy Clinical Environments
summary: Real-world clinical diagnosis is a complex process in which the doctor is required to obtain information from both interaction with the patient and conducting medical exams. Additionally, the doctor needs to adapt to different patient personas, as well as noisy and incomplete information that can happen at any time during the process. However, existing benchmarks for medical LLMs and methods for automatic diagnosis largely simplify this process by reducing it to single-turn question answering, noise-free conversations, or sequential exam making, etc., ignoring the interactive and uncertain nature of clinical diagnosis. In this paper, we aim to address this gap by formalizing clinical diagnosis as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) with three action types: questioning the patient, ordering medical exams as tool calls, and issuing a diagnosis. We also introduce a systematic noise model comprising seven patient noise types and three exam noise types. Using our proposed environment, we train an effective diagnosis agent, \textbf{MedExAgent}, through a two-stage pipeline that first performs supervised finetuning on synthetic conversations structured after the Calgary-Cambridge model for clinical interviews, and then applies DAPO to optimize a composite reward capturing diagnostic accuracy, tool call quality, and exam cost including financial cost and patient discomfort. Through extensive experiments and ablation studies, we demonstrate that MedExAgent achieves diagnostic performance comparable to larger models while maintaining cost-efficient examination strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将临床诊断建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），并构建了包含七种患者噪声和三种检查噪声的系统性噪声模型，在此基础上通过两阶段训练（监督微调+DAPO强化学习）得到诊断智能体MedExAgent，在保持成本效益的同时实现了与更大模型相当的诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的医疗大语言模型基准和自动诊断方法严重简化了真实临床诊断过程，将其降级为单轮问答、无噪声对话或顺序检查等简化场景，忽视了临床诊断的交互性和不确定性本质，无法反映医生在真实诊疗中需要面对不同患者人格、噪声信息和不完整信息等复杂情况。
AI.method: 本文将临床诊断形式化为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），包含三类动作：询问患者、调用医疗检查工具和给出诊断；引入包含七种患者噪声和三种检查噪声的系统性噪声模型；提出了MedExAgent智能体，通过两阶段训练：先基于Calgary-Cambridge临床访谈模型构建的合成对话进行监督微调，再使用DAPO算法优化复合奖励函数（综合诊断准确性、工具调用质量和检查成本，包括经济成本和患者不适度）。
AI.result: 通过大量实验和消融研究，MedExAgent在诊断性能上达到了与更大规模模型相当的水平，同时保持了成本效益更高的检查策略，验证了所提出的POMDP形式化框架和两阶段训练方法在处理噪声、不完整信息的交互式诊断场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了将临床诊断建模为部分可观测决策过程并结合结构化临床访谈模板与强化学习的可行性，为构建更贴近真实临床实践的交互式自动诊断系统提供了新的范式，并指出了考虑噪声和不确定性对提升诊断智能体鲁棒性的重要价值。

title: Securing Computer-Use Agents: A Unified Architecture-Lifecycle Framework for Deployment-Grounded Reliability
summary: Computer-use agents(CUAs)are moving frombounded benchmarks toward real software environments, wherethey operate browsers, desktops, mobile applications, flesystems,terminals, and tool backends. In such settings, reliability isno longer captured by task success alone: perception errors,planning drift, memory use, tool mediation, permission scope,and runtime oversight jointly determine whether agent actionsremain aligned with user intent, Existing surveys organize theCUA landscape by methods, platforms, benchmarks, or securitythreats, but less explicitly connect capability formation, author-ity exposure, failure manifestation, and control placement. Toaddress this gap, the article develops an architecture-lifecycleframework for deployment-grounded reliability in CUAs. Thearchitectural view analyzes Perception, Decision, and Executionas coupled layers that transform software observations intoauthority-bearing actions, The lifecycle view examines Creation.Deployment, Operation, and Maintenance as stages in which priorsare learned, tools and permissions are bound, runtime trajecto.ries are stressed, and assurance must be preserved under drift.Using this lens, the analysis synthesizes representative systems,benchmarks, and security/privacy studies; distinguishes wherefailures become visible from where their enabling conditions areintroduced, and maps recurring intervention surfaces for controloversight, and assurance. OpenClaw is used only as a public moti.vating example of an open deployment pattern, not as a verifedinternal case study. The conclusion highlights open challengesin controllable grounding, long-horizon constraint preservation,safe authority binding, mixed-trust runtime defense, privacy-preserving memory,and continual assurance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种架构-生命周期统一框架，用于分析计算机使用智能体在真实软件环境中的部署可靠性，从感知、决策、执行三层架构与创建、部署、运维、维护四阶段生命周期出发，系统性地连接能力形成、权限暴露、故障显现与控制机制之间的关联。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机使用智能体（CUA）研究从受控基准测试向真实软件环境迁移，可靠性不仅取决于任务成功率，还受感知错误、规划漂移、内存使用、工具中介、权限范围及运行时监控等多因素共同影响。既有综述按方法、平台、基准或安全威胁组织研究，但缺乏对能力形成、权限暴露、故障显现与控制放置之间关系的系统性连接。
AI.method: 本文提出一个面向部署可靠性的架构-生命周期分析框架：架构层面将CUA建模为感知（Perception）、决策（Decision）、执行（Execution）三层耦合系统，解释软件观测如何转化为带有权限的动作；生命周期层面划分为创建（Creation）、部署（Deployment）、运维（Operation）、维护（Maintenance）四个阶段，分析先验知识学习、工具与权限绑定、运行时轨迹压力测试以及漂移下的保障保持。利用该框架综合分析了代表性系统、基准测试和安全/隐私研究，区分故障可见位置与其使能条件的引入点，并映射了控制、监控与保障的介入面。
AI.result: 通过所提出的框架系统性地梳理了现有CUA系统、基准测试及安全/隐私研究，明确了故障在何处变得可见与其使能条件在何处引入之间的区别，并定位了可进行干预的控制、监控与保障接口。OpenClaw仅作为开放部署模式的公开示例被引用，未作为经过验证的内部案例。
AI.conclusion: 指出开放挑战包括可控的基础对齐、长程约束保持、安全的权限绑定、混合信任运行时防御、隐私保护记忆以及持续保障。

title: Visual Text Compression as Measure Transport
summary: Visual text compression (VTC) promises efficient long-context processing by rendering text into an image and re-encoding it with a vision-language model, often producing $3$--$20\times$ fewer decoder tokens than subword tokenization. Yet token savings do not translate predictably into downstream utility: on some tasks the visual path matches or exceeds the text path, on others it collapses, and the compression ratio itself does not predict which regime will occur. The missing quantity is therefore not another summary of efficiency, but a principled measure of task-relevant information loss induced by visual encoding. We address this problem by formulating VTC in the language of measure transport. Treating text and visual tokens as empirical probability measures, we show that the ViT patch encoder induces a push-forward map whose transport cost decomposes into a precision cost from within-patch aggregation and a coverage cost from cross-patch fragmentation. Both terms are estimable from downstream-label-free probes. This formulation yields two operational consequences: a downstream-label-free routing criterion that selects whether to use the visual path for a given input or benchmark instance, and a transport-informed foveation mechanism that re-encodes high-cost regions at higher resolution. Across $24$ NLP datasets at Qwen3-4B, our label-free rule matches the per-dataset oracle on $17/24$ datasets ($70.8\%$), and improves the average task score by $+3.3\%$ with $-10.3\%$ average tokens relative to a pure-LLM.

AI.tldr: 本文将视觉文本压缩（VTC）建模为测度传输问题，提出标签无关的路由准则和传输引导的注视机制，在24个NLP数据集上以70.8%的准确率匹配oracle选择，平均任务分数提升3.3%的同时节省10.3%的token。
AI.motivation: 视觉文本压缩（VTC）通过将文本渲染为图像并用视觉语言模型重新编码，能够大幅减少解码器token数量（3–20倍），但token节省与下游任务效用之间缺乏可预测的对应关系：在某些任务上视觉路径表现优异，在另一些任务上则完全失效，且压缩比本身无法预测哪种情况会发生。现有研究缺少一个原则性的、与任务相关的信息损失度量来解释这种不一致性。
AI.method: 本文将VTC建模为测度传输问题，将文本和视觉token视为经验概率测度，证明ViT补丁编码器诱导了一个推送映射（push-forward map），其传输代价分解为补丁内聚合的精度代价（precision cost）和跨补丁碎片化的覆盖代价（coverage cost），两项均可通过不依赖下游标签的探针估计。基于此提出两个操作化方案：一个无需下游标签的路由准则，用于为每个输入或基准实例选择是否使用视觉路径；一个传输引导的注视机制（transport-informed foveation），对高代价区域以更高分辨率重新编码。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-4B上跨越24个NLP数据集的实验中，所提无标签路由规则在17/24个数据集（70.8%）上匹配了针对每个数据集的oracle选择，平均任务分数提升3.3%，同时相对于纯LLM路径平均节省10.3%的token。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了VTC中token效率与下游效用之间不一致的根本原因在于视觉编码引入了可分解的精度代价和覆盖代价，并证明了通过测度传输理论可以构建有效的标签无关路由机制来在实际部署中做出最优路径选择，为视觉语言模型的高效推理提供了理论基础和实用工具。

title: GraphDC: A Divide-and-Conquer Multi-Agent System for Scalable Graph Algorithm Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong potential for many mathematical problems. However, their performance on graph algorithmic tasks is still unsatisfying, since graphs are naturally more complex in topology and often require systematic multi-step reasoning, especially on larger graphs. Motivated by this gap, we propose GraphDC, a Divide-and-Conquer multi-agent framework for scalable graph algorithm reasoning. Specifically, inspired by Divide-and-Conquer design, GraphDC decomposes an input graph into smaller subgraphs, assigns each subgraph to a specialized agent for local reasoning, and uses a master agent to integrate the local outputs with inter-subgraph information to produce the final solution. This hierarchical design reduces the reasoning burden on individual agents, alleviates computational bottlenecks, and improves robustness on large graph instances. Extensive experiments show that GraphDC consistently outperforms existing methods on graph algorithm reasoning across diverse tasks and scales, especially on larger instances where direct end-to-end reasoning is less reliable.

AI.tldr: GraphDC 是一个基于分治策略的多智能体框架，通过将大图分解为子图并分配专门智能体进行局部推理，再由主智能体整合全局信息，显著提升了大型语言模型在图算法推理任务上的可扩展性和鲁棒性，尤其在大规模图上表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在图算法推理任务上表现不佳，因为图具有天然的拓扑复杂性，且在大规模图上需要进行系统性的多步推理，而当前端到端推理方法难以应对这种可扩展性挑战。
AI.method: GraphDC 采用分治策略的多智能体框架，首先将输入图分解为较小的子图，然后为每个子图分配一个专门智能体进行局部推理，最后通过一个主智能体整合各局部输出和子图间交互信息，生成最终解决方案，从而降低单个智能体的推理负担并缓解计算瓶颈。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，GraphDC 在多种图算法推理任务和不同规模上均持续优于现有方法，尤其是在大规模图实例上，端到端推理不可靠时优势更为显著。
AI.conclusion: 分治策略的多智能体协同推理框架能够有效提升 LLM 在图算法推理任务上的可扩展性和鲁棒性，为大图上的复杂推理问题提供了一种可行且高效的解决方案。

title: Region4Web: Rethinking Observation Space Granularity for Web Agents
summary: Web agents perceive web pages through an observation space, yet its granularity has remained an underexamined design choice. Existing work treats observation at the same element-level granularity as the action space, leaving the page's functional organization implicit and forcing the agent to infer it from element-level signals at every step. We argue observation should instead operate at the granularity of functional regions, parts of the page that each serve a distinct purpose. We propose Region4Web, a framework that reorganizes the AXTree into functional regions through hierarchical decomposition and semantic abstraction, exposing the page's functional organization as the basis for page state understanding. Moreover, we propose PageDigest, a web-specific inference pipeline that delivers this region-level observation to the actor agent as a compact per-page digest that persists across steps. On the WebArena benchmark, PageDigest substantially reduces observation length while improving overall task success rate across diverse backbone large language models (LLMs) and established agent methods, regardless of backbone capacity. These results show that operating at the granularity of functional regions delivers a more compact and informative basis for the actor agent than element-level processing alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Region4Web框架，通过将网页AXTree层次化分解为功能区域，并设计PageDigest推理管线为智能体提供跨步骤持久的区域级观测，在WebArena基准上显著缩短观测长度并提升多种LLM骨干和智能体方法的任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有Web智能体将观测空间与动作空间均设为元素级粒度，导致网页的功能组织结构被隐式化，智能体需在每一步从海量元素级信号中自行推断页面功能，缺乏更紧凑、语义更丰富的观测表示。
AI.method: 提出Region4Web框架，通过层次化分解与语义抽象将网页AXTree重组为功能区域，暴露页面的功能组织结构作为页面状态理解的基础；并设计PageDigest，一种面向Web的专用推理管线，将区域级观测以紧凑的逐页摘要形式传递给执行智能体，该摘要跨步骤持续有效。
AI.result: 在WebArena基准上，PageDigest显著缩短了观测长度，并在多种骨干LLM（不同容量）以及已有智能体方法上一致提升了任务成功率，验证了功能区域粒度观测比纯元素级处理更紧凑且信息更丰富。
AI.conclusion: 功能区域粒度的观测为Web智能体提供了比元素级处理更紧凑且更富含功能信息的表示基础，表明将观测粒度与页面功能组织对齐是提升Web智能体性能的有效设计方向。

title: HumanNet: Scaling Human-centric Video Learning to One Million Hours
summary: Progress in embodied intelligence increasingly depends on scalable data infrastructure. While vision and language have scaled with internet corpora, learning physical interaction remains constrained by the lack of large, diverse, and richly annotated human activity data. We present HumanNet, a one-million-hour human-centric video corpus that captures how humans interact with the physical world at scale. HumanNet spans both first-person and third-person perspectives and covers fine-grained activities, human-object interactions, tool use, and long-horizon behaviors across diverse real-world environments. Beyond raw video, the dataset provides interaction-centric annotations, including captions, motion descriptions, and hand and body-related signals, enabling motion-aware and interaction-aware learning. Beyond scale, HumanNet introduces a systematic data curation paradigm for embodied learning, where human-centric filtering, temporal structuring, viewpoint diversity, and annotation enrichment are treated as first-class design principles. This design transforms unstructured internet video into a scalable substrate for representation learning, activity understanding, motion generation, and human-to-robot transfer. We conduct a first-step validation on the value of this design through controlled vision-language-action ablation: under a fixed set of validation data, continued training from the Qwen VLM model with 1000 hours of egocentric video drawn from HumanNet surpasses the continued training with 100 hours of real-robot data from Magic Cobot, indicating that egocentric human video could be a scalable and cost-effective substitute for robot data. By building this project, we aim to explore the opportunity to scale embodied foundation models using human-centric videos, rather than relying solely on robot-specific data.

AI.tldr: HumanNet是一个包含100万小时人类中心视频的大规模语料库，通过系统化的数据策展范式将非结构化互联网视频转化为可用于具身学习的可扩展数据基础设施，实验表明基于第一人称人类视频的继续训练效果优于同等规模的真实机器人数据。
AI.motivation: 具身智能的进步受限于缺乏大规模、多样化且富含标注的人类活动数据，与视觉和语言领域已利用互联网语料库实现规模化不同，物理交互学习的数据基础设施严重不足，现有机器人数据规模有限且成本高昂。
AI.method: HumanNet包含100万小时、涵盖第一人称和第三人称视角的人类中心视频，覆盖细粒度活动、人-物交互、工具使用及长时序行为，并提供包括描述、运动描述及手部和身体相关信号在内的交互中心标注。该数据集引入了一种系统化的具身学习数据策展范式，将人类中心过滤、时间结构化、视角多样性和标注丰富性作为一等设计原则，将非结构化互联网视频转化为可扩展的表示学习、活动理解、运动生成和人到机器人迁移的基础数据。
AI.result: 在固定验证集下，使用HumanNet中1000小时第一人称视频对Qwen VLM模型进行继续训练，其性能超过了使用Magic Cobot中100小时真实机器人数据继续训练的结果，表明第一人称人类视频可成为机器人数据的可扩展且成本低廉的替代品。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，以人类中心视频替代机器人专用数据来规模化具身基础模型是可行且高效的路径，通过系统化的数据策展设计可以释放互联网视频在具身学习中的潜力，为具身智能的数据基础设施建设提供了新的方向。

title: Fast and Effective Redistricting Optimization via Composite-Move Tabu Search
summary: Spatial redistricting is a practical combinatorial optimization problem that demands high-quality solutions, rapid turnaround, and flexibility to accommodate multi-criteria objectives and interactive refinement. A central challenge is the contiguity constraint: enforcing contiguity in integer-programming or heuristic search can severely shrink the feasible neighborhood, weaken exploration, and trap the search in poor local optima. We introduce a composite-move Tabu search (CM-Tabu) that systematically expands the feasible neighborhood space in Tabu search while preserving contiguity. When a boundary unit cannot be reassigned individually without disconnecting its district, our method identifies a minimal set of units that can move together, or a pair of units (or sets of units) that can be switched, as a contiguity-preserving composite move. Candidate single-unit and composite moves are generated in linear time by analyzing each district's contiguity graph using articulation points and biconnected components. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach substantially improves solution quality, run-to-run robustness, and computational efficiency relative to traditional Tabu search and other baselines. For example, in the Philadelphia case, the approach can consistently attain the theoretical global optimum in population-equality and support multi-criteria trade-offs. CM-Tabu delivers optimization performance suitable for real-world practices and decision-support workflows.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种复合移动禁忌搜索（CM-Tabu）方法，通过识别并利用图论中的关节点和双连通分量来构造保连通性的复合移动，系统性地扩展现有禁忌搜索在空间重划问题中的可行邻域空间，从而显著提升解质量、鲁棒性和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 空间重划是一类需要高质量解、快速迭代以及支持多准则目标与交互式优化的实际组合优化问题，其核心挑战在于连通性约束：在整数规划或启发式搜索中强制保持连通性会严重压缩可行邻域空间，削弱搜索的探索能力，使算法容易陷入较差的局部最优解。
AI.method: 本文提出复合移动禁忌搜索（CM-Tabu），其核心思想是当边界单元无法在不破坏所在选区连通性的前提下被单独重新分配时，通过分析每个选区的连通图，利用关节点和双连通分量在O(n)时间内生成两类保连通性的复合移动：一是一组可一起移动的单元集合（复合移动），二是可交换的一对单元或单元集合（交换移动），从而系统性地扩展禁忌搜索的可行邻域空间。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，与传统禁忌搜索及其他基线方法相比，CM-Tabu在解质量、运行间鲁棒性和计算效率上均有显著提升。以费城案例为例，该方法能够在人口均衡性方面持续达到理论全局最优，并支持多准则目标的权衡优化。
AI.conclusion: CM-Tabu通过图论驱动的复合移动机制有效破解了空间重划中连通性约束带来的搜索困境，提供了适用于实际决策工作流的高性能优化方案，表明在启发式搜索中系统性地扩展可行邻域是提升组合优化效果的有效途径。

title: CLIPer: Tailoring Diverse User Preference via Classifier-Guided Inference-Time Personalization
summary: Personalized LLMs can significantly enhance user experiences by tailoring responses to preferences such as helpfulness, conciseness, and humor. However, fine-tuning models to address all possible combinations of user preferences is computationally expensive and impractical. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{CLIPer}(\textbf{Cl}assifier-guided \textbf{I}nference-time \textbf{Per}sonalization), a lightweight personalization approach that leverages a classifier model to steer LLM generation dynamically to different user preferences at inference time. Our method eliminates the need for extensive fine-tuning, inducing negligible additional computational overhead while enabling more controllable and nuanced personalization across single and multi-dimensional preferences. Comprehensive empirical analyses demonstrate the scalability and effectiveness of our approach in delivering personalized language generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIPer，一种基于分类器引导的推理时个性化方法，通过在推理阶段动态调整LLM生成行为以适应不同用户偏好，避免了昂贵的全模型微调，实现了轻量级、可控且可扩展的个性化语言生成。
AI.motivation: 现有的个性化LLM方法通常依赖针对不同用户偏好的全模型微调，这在面对多种偏好组合时计算成本极高且不切实际；因此需要一种轻量级、无需重新训练即可在推理时动态适配多样用户偏好（如帮助性、简洁性、幽默感）的个性化方案。
AI.method: CLIPer（Classifier-guided Inference-time Personalization）采用一个额外的分类器模型在推理阶段动态引导LLM的生成过程，通过分类器对当前生成结果与目标偏好之间的匹配度进行评分，从而调整后续生成方向，实现无需微调即可适配单一或多维用户偏好，且仅引入极小的额外计算开销。
AI.result: 综合实验表明，CLIPer在单维度和多维度偏好场景下均能有效实现可控且细腻的个性化生成，该方法具有良好的可扩展性，能够在保持极低额外计算成本的前提下显著提升LLM对用户偏好的适配能力。
AI.conclusion: CLIPer证明了推理时引导机制可以作为传统微调方法的高效替代方案，为低成本、细粒度的LLM个性化提供了新范式；其轻量特性使其在实际部署中具有显著优势，未来可进一步拓展至更复杂的多维偏好控制和实时自适应场景。

title: TRAJGANR: Trajectory-Centric Urban Multimodal Learning via Geospatially Aligned Neural Representations
summary: Multimodal self-supervised learning (MSSL) has emerged as a key paradigm for pretraining geospatial foundation models. However, existing geospatial MSSL methods are mainly designed for static pairs of modalities, such as satellite imagery, street-view imagery, and text, where learning is driven by aligning observations from the same or nearby locations. This assumption breaks down for human mobility trajectories, which represent continuous movement along paths rather than discrete observations at individual locations. Although trajectories are important for urban understanding through their ability to capture human activity across roads, neighborhoods, and places over time, they remain largely underexplored in current geospatial MSSL frameworks. We present TrajGANR, a novel trajectory-centric geospatial MSSL framework that aligns continuous movement patterns with static, location-based observations. TrajGANR learns a continuous neural representation of trajectories at arbitrary points along each path, which enables fine-grained alignment with nearby street-view images, even when they are not co-located with any trajectory waypoints. We leverage this capability to introduce an MSSL objective that jointly aligns three modalities: trajectories, street-view images, and their geographic locations. We evaluate TrajGANR on four urban mobility and road understanding tasks. Across these tasks, TrajGANR consistently outperforms existing geospatial MSSL frameworks and a trajectory-specific foundation model. Ablation studies further demonstrate that our proposed MSSL objective and the multimodal learning framework are the primary drivers of these improvements, highlighting the importance of fine-grained geospatial alignment over coarser aggregation, as well as geospatial multimodal learning.

AI.tldr: TrajGANR 提出了一种以轨迹为中心的多模态自监督学习框架，通过连续轨迹神经表示实现与街景图像及地理位置的细粒度对齐，在多个城市理解任务上超越了现有地理空间基础模型。
AI.motivation: 现有地理空间多模态自监督学习方法主要针对静态模态对（如卫星图像、街景图像和文本）设计，依赖同一或邻近位置的离散观测对齐，无法处理人类移动轨迹这类连续路径数据。轨迹虽能通过捕捉道路、社区和场所上的人类活动对城市理解至关重要，但在地理空间自监督学习框架中仍未得到充分探索。
AI.method: TrajGANR 学习轨迹在路径上任意点的连续神经表示，实现与附近街景图像的细粒度对齐，即使图像与轨迹路点不共置。基于此能力，提出一个联合对齐轨迹、街景图像及其地理位置三种模态的多模态自监督学习目标。
AI.result: 在四个城市移动和道路理解任务上，TrajGANR 持续优于现有地理空间自监督学习框架及一个轨迹特定基础模型。消融实验表明，所提出的多模态自监督学习目标和多模态学习框架是性能提升的主要驱动因素，验证了细粒度地理空间对齐优于粗粒度聚合，以及地理空间多模态学习的价值。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了对连续轨迹进行细粒度神经表示并与静态模态对齐是提升地理空间基础模型性能的有效途径，强调了在轨迹模态中细粒度地理空间对齐和多模态联合学习的重要性，为城市理解和移动性分析提供了新的范式。

title: Hidden Coalitions in Multi-Agent AI: A Spectral Diagnostic from Internal Representations
summary:
Collections of interacting AI agents can form coalitions, creating emergent group-level organization that is critical for AI safety and alignment. However, observing agent behavior alone is often insufficient to distinguish genuine informational coupling from spurious similarity, as consequential coalitions may form at the level of internal representations before any overt behavioral change is apparent. Here, we introduce a practical method for detecting coalition structure from the internal neural representations of multi-agent systems. The approach constructs a pairwise mutual-information graph from the hidden states of agents and applies spectral partitioning to identify the most salient coalition boundary.
  We validate this method in two domains. First, in multi-agent reinforcement learning environments, the method successfully recovers programmed hierarchical and dynamic coalition structures and correctly rejects false positives arising from behavioral coordination without informational coupling. Second, using a large language model, the method identifies coalition structures implied by descriptive prompts, tracks dynamic team reassignments, and reveals a representational hierarchy where explicit labels dominate over conflicting interaction patterns. Across both settings, the recovered partition reveals subgroup organization that a scalar cross-agent mutual-information measure cannot distinguish. The results demonstrate that analyzing hidden-state mutual information through spectral partitioning provides a scalable diagnostic for identifying representational coalitions, offering a valuable tool for monitoring emergent structure in distributed AI systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通过分析多智能体系统内部神经表征的互信息图并进行谱分解来检测联盟结构的方法，并在多智能体强化学习和大型语言模型两个领域中验证了其有效性，为监控分布式AI系统中的涌现组织提供了可扩展的诊断工具。
AI.motivation: 多智能体AI系统中，智能体可以形成联盟并产生涌现的群体级组织，这对AI安全与对齐至关重要。然而，仅观察智能体的外在行为往往不足以区分真正的信息耦合与虚假的相似性，因为具有实质影响的联盟可能在行为变化之前就已在内部表征层面形成，现有方法难以从内部表征层面检测这种结构。
AI.method: 提出了一种从多智能体系统内部神经表征中检测联盟结构的实用方法。该方法首先基于智能体隐藏状态构建成对互信息图，然后应用谱分解（谱划分）来识别最显著的联盟边界。该方法无需依赖外部行为观测即可捕捉信息层面的耦合关系。
AI.result: 在多智能体强化学习环境中，该方法成功恢复了预设的分层和动态联盟结构，并正确排除了由行为协调而无信息耦合导致的假阳性。在大型语言模型中，该方法识别出了由描述性提示暗示的联盟结构，追踪了动态团队重组，并揭示了显式标签主导冲突交互模式这一表征层级性。在这两种场景下，谱分解恢复的划分揭示了标量交叉智能体互信息度量无法区分的子群组织。
AI.conclusion: 通过谱分解分析隐藏状态互信息提供了一种可扩展的诊断方法，用于识别表征层面的联盟结构，为监测分布式AI系统中的涌现组织提供了有价值的工具。该方法能捕捉到行为层面无法直接观察到的内部表征耦合，对AI安全与对齐研究具有重要启示。

title: Learning Agent Routing From Early Experience
summary: LLM agents achieve strong performance on complex reasoning tasks but incur high latency and compute cost. In practice, many queries fall within the capability boundary of cutting-edge LLMs and do not require full agent execution, making effective routing between LLMs and agents a key challenge. We study the problem of routing queries between lightweight LLM inference and full agent execution under realistic cold-start settings. To address this, we propose BoundaryRouter, a training-free routing framework that uses early behavioral experience and rubric-guided reasoning to decide whether to answer a query with direct LLM inference or escalate to an agent. BoundaryRouter builds a compact experience memory by executing both systems on a shared seed set and retrieves similar cases at inference time to guide routing decisions. To evaluate this method, we introduce RouteBench, a benchmark covering in-domain, paraphrased, and out-of-domain route settings. Experiments show that BoundaryRouter reduces inference time by 60.6% compared to the agent while improving performance by 28.6% over direct LLM inference, outperforming prompt-based and retrieval-only routing by an average of 37.9% and 8.2%, respectively.

AI.tldr: BoundaryRouter是一种无需训练的路由框架，通过早期行为经验和基于评分准则的推理，在轻量级LLM推理与完整智能体执行之间进行查询路由，在RouteBench上实现推理时间降低60.6%的同时性能比直接LLM推理提升28.6%。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在复杂推理任务上表现优异但延迟和计算成本高昂，而实际应用中大量查询处于前沿LLM能力边界内无需完整智能体执行，因此如何在冷启动场景下有效将查询路由至轻量级LLM推理或完整智能体执行成为关键挑战。
AI.method: BoundaryRouter是一种无需训练（training-free）的路由框架，通过收集两个系统在共享种子集上的早期行为经验构建紧凑的经验记忆库，并在推理时检索相似案例，结合基于评分准则（rubric-guided）的推理来决定查询是直接由LLM回答还是升级至智能体执行。
AI.result: 在提出的RouteBench基准（涵盖领域内、释义和领域外路由设置）上，BoundaryRouter相比完整智能体执行减少60.6%的推理时间，同时比直接LLM推理提升28.6%的性能，且分别优于基于提示的路由和纯检索路由平均37.9%和8.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了在冷启动场景下，通过早期经验记忆与评分准则推理相结合的无训练路由策略能够有效平衡LLM推理效率与智能体性能，为实际部署中查询的动态分配提供了可行方案。

title: LensVLM: Selective Context Expansion for Compressed Visual Representation of Text
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) offer the exciting possibility of processing text as rendered images, bypassing the need for tokenizing the text into long token sequences. Since VLM image encoders map fixed-size images to a fixed number of visual tokens, varying rendering resolution provides a fine-grained compression knob. However, accuracy deteriorates quickly as compression increases: characters shrink below the vision encoder's effective resolution, making them indistinguishable. To address this, we propose LensVLM, an inference framework and post-training recipe that enables VLMs to scan compressed images, then selectively expand only the relevant images to their uncompressed form via learned tools. Building on Qwen3.5-9B-Base, LensVLM maintains accuracy comparable to the full-text upper bound at 4.3x effective compression and outperforms retrieval-based, text- and visual-compression baselines up to 10.1x effective compression across seven text QA benchmarks. LensVLM also generalizes to multimodal document and code understanding tasks, with the accuracy gain over baselines growing as compression increases. Our analysis validates this approach: training makes visual compression robust to rendering choices, and as compression grows the model increasingly relies on expanded content rather than unreliable visual reading. The analysis also yields practical tool-choice guidance: text expansion is preferable for rendered text, while high-resolution image expansion suits native documents whose layout cues carry task-relevant information.

AI.tldr: LensVLM 提出一种推理框架与训练策略，使视觉语言模型先扫描压缩图像，再通过学习的工具选择性地将相关图像展开为未压缩形式，在 4.3 倍有效压缩下保持与全文本上界相当的精度，并在最高 10.1 倍压缩下超越检索式、文本压缩和视觉压缩基线。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型将文本渲染为图像处理可绕过分词带来的长序列问题，但图像压缩会导致字符低于编码器有效分辨率而难以辨认，精度迅速下降，现有压缩方法在强压缩下无法维持可靠性能。
AI.method: LensVLM 构建在 Qwen3.5-9B-Base 之上，采用两阶段推理：先对压缩图像进行低分辨率扫描，再通过学习到的工具调用选择性地将相关图像展开为原始未压缩形式进行精细阅读，配合后训练微调策略实现压缩鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在 4.3 倍有效压缩下 LensVLM 精度与全文本上界相当，在最高 10.1 倍压缩下在七个文本问答基准上优于检索式、文本压缩和视觉压缩基线；该方法还可泛化至多模态文档与代码理解任务，且压缩越大相对基线优势越明显。
AI.conclusion: 训练使视觉压缩对渲染选择具有鲁棒性，模型在高压缩下更依赖展开内容而非不可靠的视觉阅读；工具选择方面，文本展开更适合渲染文本，而高分辨率图像展开适合保留布局线索的原生文档理解任务。

title: CASCADE: Case-Based Continual Adaptation for Large Language Models During Deployment
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have become a central foundation of modern artificial intelligence, yet their lifecycle remains constrained by a rigid separation between training and deployment, after which learning effectively ceases. This limitation contrasts with natural intelligence, which continually adapts through interaction with its environment. In this paper, we formalise deployment-time learning (DTL) as the third stage in the LLM lifecycle that enables LLM agents to improve from experience during deployment without modifying model parameters. We present CASCADE (CASe-based Continual Adaptation during DEployment), a general and principled framework that equips LLM agents with an explicit, evolving episodic memory. CASCADE formulates experience reuse as a contextual bandit problem, enabling principled exploration-exploitation trade-offs and establishing no-regret guarantees over long-term interactions. This design allows agents to accumulate, select, and refine task-relevant cases, transforming past experience into actionable knowledge. Across 16 diverse tasks spanning medical diagnosis, legal analysis, code generation, web search, tool use, and embodied interaction, CASCADE improves macro-averaged success rate by 20.9% over zero-shot prompting while consistently outperforming gradient-based and memory-based baselines. By reframing deployment as an adaptive learning process, this work establishes a foundation for continually improving AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出部署时学习（DTL）作为LLM生命周期的第三阶段，并设计了CASCADE框架，通过显式的演化情景记忆和上下文赌博机机制，使LLM agent在不修改参数的情况下从部署经验中持续改进，在16个任务上平均成功率提升20.9%。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM的生命周期严格区分为训练和部署两个阶段，部署后学习能力基本停滞，这与自然智能中通过环境交互持续适应的特性存在显著差距。该研究旨在填补这一空白，使LLM agent能够在部署后继续从交互经验中学习提升。
AI.method: 论文形式化定义了部署时学习（DTL）作为LLM生命周期的第三阶段，并提出CASCADE框架。该框架为LLM agent配备显式且可演化的情景记忆，将经验复用建模为上下文赌博机问题，从而在理论上实现无遗憾保证的探索-利用权衡，使agent能够积累、选择和精炼任务相关案例，将过去经验转化为可操作知识。
AI.result: 在覆盖医学诊断、法律分析、代码生成、网页搜索、工具使用和具身交互等16个多样化任务中，CASCADE相比零样本提示将宏平均成功率提升20.9%，并持续优于基于梯度和基于记忆的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将部署重新定义为一种自适应学习过程，为构建持续改进的AI系统奠定了方法论基础。CASCADE的核心价值在于无需修改模型参数即可实现部署时的持续学习，为LLM agent的长周期自主演化提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Teaching Language Models to Think in Code
summary: Tool-integrated reasoning (TIR) has emerged as a dominant paradigm for mathematical problem solving in language models, combining natural language (NL) reasoning with code execution. However, this interleaved setup has three key limitations: code often acts as a post-hoc verifier, intermediate NL computations are error-prone, and NL and code play overlapping rather than clearly distinct roles. We propose ThinC (Thinking in Code), a framework in which code itself serves as the reasoner rather than as a tool invoked by NL. A ThinC trajectory begins with a brief NL planning step, after which all reasoning unfolds through code blocks connected only by their execution outputs. We distill 12.2k code-centric trajectories from a teacher model and train ThinC-1.7B and ThinC-4B with supervised fine-tuning followed by reinforcement learning. ThinC-4B consistently outperforms every TIR baseline on five competition-level math benchmarks and even surpasses the much larger Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking. Further analysis shows that ThinC reasons through code: 99.2% of its final answers are grounded in interpreter output, and the model recovers reliably from code execution failures without intermediate NL reasoning. Our code and models will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 ThinC 框架，将代码本身作为推理主体而非辅助工具，通过纯代码驱动推理结合监督微调与强化学习训练小型模型，在竞赛级数学基准上超越包括 Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking 在内的多种工具集成推理基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有工具集成推理（TIR）范式在数学问题求解中交织自然语言推理与代码执行，存在三个关键缺陷：代码常仅作为事后验证工具、中间自然语言计算易出错、自然语言与代码角色重叠导致分工不明。作者旨在解决这些问题，探索一种让代码承担主要推理职责的新型推理框架。
AI.method: ThinC 框架要求模型在简短的自然语言规划步骤后，所有后续推理完全通过代码块进行，代码块之间仅通过执行输出连接。作者从教师模型中蒸馏出 12.2k 条纯代码驱动推理轨迹，基于此对 ThinC-1.7B 和 ThinC-4B 进行监督微调，随后使用强化学习进一步训练。
AI.result: ThinC-4B 在五个竞赛级数学基准上一致优于所有 TIR 基线模型，甚至超越了参数规模远大的 Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking 模型。分析表明，ThinC 的 99.2% 最终答案源于解释器输出，且模型能在代码执行失败时可靠恢复，无需中间自然语言推理。
AI.conclusion: ThinC 证明纯代码驱动的推理范式能够在数学推理任务中以更小的模型规模取得超越大规模 TIR 模型的性能，其核心优势在于推理过程紧密依赖解释器输出而非自然语言中间步骤，从而显著降低计算错误并提升鲁棒性，为语言模型的数学推理提供了新的方向。

title: Pan-FM: A Pan-Organ Foundation Model with Saliency-Guided Masking for Missing Robustness
summary: Foundation models (FMs) have shown great promise in medical imaging, but most FMs are trained on unimodal data within isolated domains, such as brain MRI alone. Human aging and disease arise through coordinated biological processes across organs, therefore motivating multimodal FMs that learn whole-body representations. A key challenge, however, is that real-world multimodal biomedical data are often missing not at random, which can reduce power, limit generalizability, and introduce bias. We propose Pan-FM, a pan-organ foundation model pre-trained on imaging from seven organs (Brain, Heart, Adipose, Liver, Kidney, Spleen, and Pancreas) under realistic missing-organ scenarios. Pan-FM uses a unified backbone that handles organ missingness during both training and inference, and is pre-trained with masking-based self-distillation. We find that naive multimodal pre-training leads to dominant-organ shortcut learning bias, with the model over-relying on dominant organs such as adipose and heart. To address this, we introduce Saliency-Guided Masking (SGM), which uses the model attention distribution to adaptively mask dominant organs during pre-training, thus encouraging more balanced cross-organ, whole-body learning. Notably, SGM introduces negligible computational overhead and can be seamlessly integrated into existing self-supervised learning frameworks to improve multi-organ representation learning. On the UK Biobank, Pan-FM achieves stronger prediction across 13 disease categories and 14 single disease entities than single-organ and multi-organ baselines, with improved robustness under missing-organ settings. Pan-FM serves as a scalable solution to realistic modality-missingness in multimodal learning in system neuroscience and as a step toward more generalizable whole-body FMs.

AI.tldr: 提出Pan-FM，一个跨七个器官（脑、心脏、脂肪、肝脏、肾脏、脾脏、胰腺）的全身基础模型，通过显著性引导掩码（SGM）解决多器官预训练中的主导器官捷径学习偏差，在UK Biobank上实现13种疾病类别和14种单疾病实体的预测性能提升，且对器官缺失场景具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有医学影像基础模型多局限于单模态、单器官数据（如仅脑部MRI），无法捕捉人体衰老与疾病中跨器官的协调生物学过程；同时，真实世界多模态生物医学数据存在非随机的器官缺失问题，导致模型效能下降、泛化能力受限并引入偏差。
AI.method: Pan-FM采用统一骨干网络，设计上支持训练和推理阶段的器官缺失；预训练采用基于掩码的自蒸馏范式；提出显著性引导掩码（Saliency-Guided Masking, SGM），利用模型注意力分布自适应地掩盖主导器官（如脂肪、心脏），从而抑制主导器官捷径学习偏差，促进跨器官的均衡全身表示学习，SGM计算开销极低且可无缝集成到现有自监督学习框架中。
AI.result: 在UK Biobank数据集上，Pan-FM在13种疾病类别和14种单疾病实体的预测任务中均优于单器官和多器官基线模型；在器官缺失场景下表现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Pan-FM为真实世界中多模态学习面临的结构化模态缺失问题提供了可扩展的解决方案，是迈向更可泛化的全身基础模型的重要一步，对系统神经科学和跨器官疾病建模具有重要启示。

title: From Storage to Experience: A Survey on the Evolution of LLM Agent Memory Mechanisms
summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents have fundamentally reshaped artificial intelligence by integrating external tools and planning capabilities. While memory mechanisms have emerged as the architectural cornerstone of these systems, current research remains fragmented, oscillating between operating system engineering and cognitive science. This theoretical divide prevents a unified view of technological synthesis and a coherent evolutionary perspective. To bridge this gap, this survey proposes a novel evolutionary framework for LLM agent memory mechanisms, formalizing the development process into three stages: Storage (trajectory preservation), Reflection (trajectory refinement), and Experience (trajectory abstraction). We first formally define these three stages before analyzing the three core drivers of this evolution: the necessity for long-range consistency, the challenges in dynamic environments, and the ultimate goal of continual learning. Furthermore, we specifically explore two transformative mechanisms in the frontier Experience stage: proactive exploration and cross-trajectory abstraction. By synthesizing these disparate views, this work offers robust design principles and a clear roadmap for the development of next-generation LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 该综述提出了一个面向大语言模型智能体记忆机制的三阶段演化框架（存储、反思、经验），系统整合了当前碎片化的研究现状，并明确了从轨迹保存到跨轨迹抽象的技术演进路径。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的智能体记忆机制研究在操作系统工程与认知科学两个范式之间碎片化分布，缺乏统一的技术综合视角和连贯的演化脉络，阻碍了下一代智能体系统的系统化设计。
AI.method: 该工作提出了一个三阶段演化框架来形式化智能体记忆机制的发展：存储阶段（轨迹保存）、反思阶段（轨迹精炼）和经验阶段（轨迹抽象），并分析了驱动这一演化的三个核心动力（长程一致性需求、动态环境挑战和持续学习目标），特别探讨了经验阶段的前瞻性探索与跨轨迹抽象两种变革性机制。
AI.result: 本文为综述性工作，通过整合碎片化的记忆机制研究，识别出记忆机制从存储到反思再到抽象的关键演化路径，为理解和设计LLM智能体的记忆架构提供了系统性的分类与分析框架。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过提出统一的演化框架弥合了现有研究范式的理论鸿沟，为下一代LLM智能体的记忆系统设计提供了稳健的设计原则和清晰的发展路线图，指明了从被动存储向主动探索与抽象演进的未来方向。

title: PaT: Planning-after-Trial for Efficient Test-Time Code Generation
summary: Beyond training-time optimization, scaling test-time computation has emerged as a key paradigm to extend the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, most existing methods adopt a rigid Planning-before-Trial (PbT) policy, which inefficiently allocates test-time compute by incurring planning overhead even on directly solvable problems. We propose Planning-after-Trial (PaT), an adaptive policy for code generation that invokes a planner only upon verification failure. This adaptive policy naturally enables a heterogeneous model configuration: a cost-efficient model handles generation attempts, while a powerful model is reserved for targeted planning interventions. Empirically, across multiple benchmarks and model families, our approach significantly advances the cost-performance Pareto frontier. Notably, our heterogeneous configuration achieves performance comparable to a large homogeneous model while reducing inference cost by approximately 69\%.

AI.tldr: 提出Planning-after-Trial (PaT)自适应策略，在代码生成任务中仅在验证失败后调用规划器，结合异构模型配置（轻量模型生成+强模型规划），在多个基准上显著提升成本-性能帕累托前沿，同等性能下推理成本降低约69%。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时计算扩展方法多采用刚性的"先规划后尝试"(PbT)策略，即使在可直接求解的问题上也会产生不必要的规划开销，导致测试时计算资源分配效率低下。
AI.method: 提出Planning-after-Trial (PaT)自适应策略：先由模型直接生成代码，仅在验证失败时才触发规划器进行干预；该策略天然支持异构模型配置，即低成本模型负责生成尝试，高性能模型仅在必要时用于规划修正。
AI.result: 在多个代码生成基准和模型系列上的实验表明，PaT方法显著推进了成本-性能帕累托前沿；异构配置（轻量生成+强模型规划）在达到与大规模同构模型相近性能的同时，推理成本降低约69%。
AI.conclusion: PaT表明自适应、按需规划的测试时计算策略能够有效替代传统的刚性规划范式，在代码生成任务中实现更优的计算效率与性能权衡，为LLM推理阶段的资源优化提供了新思路。

title: Learning to Track Instance from Single Nature Language Description
summary: How to achieve vision-language (VL) tracking using natural language descriptions from a video sequence \textbf{without relying on any bounding-box ground truth}? In this work, we achieve this goal by tackling \textit{self-supervised VL tracking}, which aims to evaluate tracking capabilities guided by natural language descriptions. We introduce \textbf{\tracker}, a novel self-supervised VL tracker that is capable of tracking any referred object by a language description. Unlike traditional methods that equally fuse all language and visual tokens, we propose an efficient Dynamic Token Aggregation Module, which treats each visual token \textbf{unequally}. The module consists of three main steps: i) Based on an anchor token, it selects multiple important target tokens from the template frame. ii) The selected target tokens are merged according to their attention scores and aggregated into the language tokens, thereby eliminating redundant visual token noise and enhancing semantic alignment. iii) Finally, the fused language tokens serve as guiding signals to extract potential target tokens from the search frame and propagate them to subsequent frames, enhancing temporal prompts and encouraging the tracker to autonomously learn instance tracking from unlabeled videos. This new modeling approach enables the effective self-supervised learning of language-guided tracking representations without the need for large-scale bounding box annotations. Extensive experiments on VL tracking benchmarks show that {\tracker} surpasses SOTA self-supervised methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督的视觉-语言跟踪框架\tracker，通过动态令牌聚合模块实现无需边界框标注的、基于自然语言描述的目标跟踪，在多个VL跟踪基准上超越了现有自监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言跟踪方法严重依赖边界框标注作为监督信号，限制了在大规模无标签视频数据上的可扩展性。本文旨在探索一种不依赖任何边界框真值的自监督VL跟踪范式，解决语言引导跟踪中缺乏标注数据的问题。
AI.method: 提出\tracker自监督VL跟踪器，核心是动态令牌聚合模块。该模块首先基于锚点令牌从模板帧中选出多个重要目标令牌；然后根据注意力分数合并这些目标令牌并聚合到语言令牌中，以消除视觉冗余噪声并增强语义对齐；最后将融合后的语言令牌作为引导信号，从搜索帧中提取潜在目标令牌并传播至后续帧，实现从无标签视频中自主学习的实例跟踪。
AI.result: 在多个VL跟踪基准上的大量实验表明，\tracker在性能上超越了现有的最先进自监督方法，验证了所提动态令牌聚合机制在无边界框标注条件下学习语言引导跟踪表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明自监督范式可以成功应用于视觉-语言跟踪任务，无需大规模边界框标注即可学习有效的语言引导跟踪表示。该工作为减少VL跟踪对人工标注的依赖提供了新思路，并展示了动态非均匀令牌聚合在跨模态对齐中的重要作用。

title: Weblica: Scalable and Reproducible Training Environments for Visual Web Agents
summary: The web is complex, open-ended, and constantly changing, making it challenging to scale training data for visual web agents. Existing data collection attempts remain limited to offline trajectories for supervised fine-tuning or a handful of simulated environments for RL training, thus failing to capture web diversity. We propose Weblica (Web Replica), a framework for constructing reproducible and scalable web environments. Our framework leverages 1) HTTP-level caching to capture and replay stable visual states while preserving interactive behavior and 2) LLM-based environment synthesis grounded in real-world websites and core web navigation skills. Using this framework, we scale RL training to thousands of diverse environments and tasks. Our best model, Weblica-8B, outperforms open-weight baselines of similar size across multiple web navigation benchmarks while using fewer inference steps, scales favorably with additional test-time compute, and is competitive with API models.

AI.tldr: Weblica是一个通过HTTP级缓存和LLM环境合成来构建可复现、可扩展网页环境的框架，使强化学习训练能够扩展到数千个多样化环境。其训练的Weblica-8B模型在多个网页导航基准上优于同尺寸开源模型，且与API模型竞争力相当。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉网页代理的训练数据收集方法存在局限：离线轨迹仅适用于监督微调，而少数模拟环境无法支撑强化学习训练，两者均难以捕捉真实网络的多样性和开放性，导致训练数据在规模和多样性上严重不足。
AI.method: Weblica框架包含两个核心组件：1) HTTP级缓存机制，用于捕获和重放稳定的视觉状态同时保留可交互行为；2) 基于LLM的环境合成方法，以真实网站和核心网页导航技能为基础生成多样化环境。该框架将强化学习训练扩展到数千个不同的环境和任务上。
AI.result: Weblica-8B模型在多个网页导航基准上超越同尺寸开源基线模型，且使用更少的推理步骤；在测试时计算量增加时性能呈正向扩展；与API模型的竞争力相当。
AI.conclusion: Weblica证明了通过缓存与合成相结合的方式构建可复现、可扩展的网页环境是可行的，能够有效弥合模拟环境与真实网络之间的差距，为视觉网页代理的强化学习训练提供了规模化路径。

title: MIPIAD: Multilingual Indirect Prompt Injection Attack Defense with Qwen -- TF-IDF Hybrid and Meta-Ensemble Learning
summary: Indirect prompt injection remains a persistent weakness in retrieval-augmented and tool-using LLM systems, and the problem becomes harder to characterise in multilingual settings. We present MIPIAD, a defense framework evaluated on English and Bangla that combines a sequence classifier fine-tuned from Qwen2.5-1.5B via LoRA (XLPID), TF-IDF lexical features, and validation-tuned ensembling through late fusion, stacking, and gradient boosting. The framework is evaluated on a synthetic benchmark built from BIPIA(Yi et al., 2023) templates spanning five task families -- email, table, QA, abstract, and code-comprising over 1.43 million generated samples, with train and test splits using mutually exclusive attack categories. Across the experiments, lexical signals prove strong (TF-IDF+SVM F1=0.77), and the hybrid XLPID+TF-IDF ensemble achieves the best overall F1 (0.9205) while the Boosting Ensemble achieves the best AUROC (0.9378). Ensemble methods consistently reduce the English-Bangla cross-lingual gap relative to standalone neural models. The pipeline is designed for extensibility: NLLB-200 supports over 200 languages and XLPID's multilingual backbone can be retargeted to additional languages without architectural changes; empirical validation is currently limited to English and Bangla

AI.tldr: MIPIAD是一个针对多语言环境下间接提示注入攻击的防御框架，通过结合LoRA微调的序列分类器（XLPID）、TF-IDF特征和集成学习（晚期融合、堆叠、梯度提升），在英语和孟加拉语的合成基准上达到0.9205的最佳F1和0.9378的最佳AUROC，并通过集成方法有效缩小了跨语言性能差距。
AI.motivation: 间接提示注入攻击在检索增强和工具使用的LLM系统中持续构成安全威胁，而在多语言场景下这一问题更加难以刻画和防御，现有研究缺乏针对非英语语言的系统化防御方案。
AI.method: 提出MIPIAD防御框架，包含三个核心组件：通过LoRA从Qwen2.5-1.5B微调的序列分类器XLPID、基于TF-IDF的词汇特征提取、以及通过晚期融合、堆叠和梯度提升三种集成策略验证调优的混合方法；框架使用NLLB-200支持200多种语言，XLPID的多语言骨干网络可在无需架构修改的情况下重新适配到其他语言。评估基于从BIPIA模板扩展的合成基准，覆盖邮件、表格、问答、摘要和代码五类任务，共超过143万样本，训练集与测试集使用互斥的攻击类别。
AI.result: 在英语和孟加拉语的合成基准上，纯词汇方法TF-IDF+SVM的F1达到0.77，展现出强信号；XLPID与TF-IDF的混合集成取得整体最佳F1（0.9205），梯度提升集成取得最佳AUROC（0.9378）；集成方法一致性地缩小了英语和孟加拉语之间的跨语言性能差距，优于独立的神经模型。
AI.conclusion: MIPIAD框架验证了词汇特征与微调神经模型的多语言集成可以显著提升对间接提示注入的检测性能，并能有效降低跨语言性能差异；框架具有良好的可扩展性，可通过NLLB-200和XLPID的多语言骨干支持更多语言，但当前实证验证仅限于英语和孟加拉语。

title: Uncovering and Shaping the Latent Representation of 3D Scene Topology in Vision-Language Models
summary: Decades of cognitive science establish that humans navigate environments by forming cognitive maps, defined as allocentric and topology-preserving representations of 3D space. While modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate emergent spatial reasoning from 2D egocentric inputs, it remains unclear whether they construct an analogous 3D internal representation. In this paper, we demonstrate that current VLMs do possess a latent topological map of 3D scenes, but it is heavily overshadowed by non-geometric visual semantics, such as color and shape. By isolating this spatial subspace through cross-scene linear feature extraction, we extract a clean spatial subspace that causally controls the model's spatial outputs. We mathematically shape this latent representation and prove its correspondence to the Laplacian eigenmaps of the scene's 3D Gaussian-kernel graph, converging to the physical 3D space in the continuous limit. Motivated by this geometric identification, we further introduce a mathematically principled latent regularization method for VLMs, based on Dirichlet energy. Applying this single-term regularizer to a minimal 500-step supervised VLM fine-tuning (SFT) on simple synthetic data yields significant improvements on real-world spatial benchmarks, outperforming standard SFT and competitive baselines by up to 12.1\% in spatial tasks involving scene topology understanding. Source code is available at https://github.com/pittisl/vlm-latent-shaping

AI.tldr: 本文发现VLMs内部存在一个潜在的3D拓扑空间图，但被非几何视觉语义所掩盖；通过跨场景线性特征提取和基于Dirichlet能量的正则化微调，该方法在空间拓扑理解任务上相比标准SFT提升高达12.1%。
AI.motivation: 尽管现代视觉-语言模型（VLM）展现出从2D自我中心输入中涌现的空间推理能力，但现有研究尚未明确回答VLM是否构建了类似认知地图的3D内部表示，以及这种表示如何被非几何视觉特征所干扰。
AI.method: 通过跨场景线性特征提取，作者从VLM的隐藏状态中分离出一个与3D场景拓扑结构对应的干净空间子空间，并数学上证明该子空间等价于场景3D高斯核图的拉普拉斯特征映射；进一步提出基于Dirichlet能量的潜在空间正则化方法，仅需在简单合成数据上进行500步监督微调即可生效。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的潜在正则化方法在真实世界空间基准任务上显著提升了VLM的空间拓扑理解能力，相比标准SFT和竞争基线最高提升12.1%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了VLM内部确实存在一个可提取、可操控的3D拓扑空间表示，并提供了一个数学上严谨且数据高效的微调范式，为提升VLM在几何空间推理任务上的表现开辟了新路径。

title: Towards Security-Auditable LLM Agents: A Unified Graph Representation
summary: LLM-based agentic systems are rapidly evolving to perform complex autonomous tasks through dynamic tool invocation, stateful memory management, and multi-agent collaboration. However, this semantics-driven execution paradigm creates a severe semantic gap between low-level physical events and high-level execution intent, making post-hoc security auditing fundamentally difficult. Existing representation mechanisms, including static SBOMs and runtime logs, provide only fragmented evidence and fail to capture cognitive-state evolution, capability bindings, persistent memory contamination, and cascading risk propagation across interacting agents. To bridge this gap, we propose Agent-BOM, a unified structural representation for agent security auditing. Agent-BOM models an agentic system as a hierarchical attributed directed graph that separates static capability bases, such as models, tools, and long-term memory, from dynamic runtime semantic states, such as goals, reasoning trajectories, and actions. These layers are connected through semantic edges and security attributes, transforming fragmented execution traces into queryable audit paths. Building on Agent-BOM, we develop a graph-query-based paradigm for path-level risk assessment and instantiate it with the OWASP Agentic Top 10. We further implement an auditing plugin in the OpenClaw environment to construct Agent-BOM from live executions. Evaluation on representative real-world agentic attack scenarios shows that Agent-BOM can reconstruct stealthy attack chains, including cross-session memory poisoning and tool misuse, capability supply-chain hijacking and unexpected code execution, multi-agent ecosystem hijacking, and privilege and trust abuse. These results demonstrate that Agent-BOM provides a unified and auditable foundation for root-cause analysis and security adjudication in complex agentic ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agent-BOM，一种面向LLM智能体系统的统一结构化审计表示方法，通过分层属性有向图分离静态能力基座与动态运行时语义状态，将碎片化执行轨迹转化为可查询的审计路径，在多种真实攻击场景下有效重构了隐蔽攻击链。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体系统在执行复杂自主任务时，其语义驱动的执行范式在底层物理事件与高层执行意图之间存在严重的语义鸿沟，导致事后安全审计极为困难。现有的表示机制如静态SBOM和运行时日志只能提供碎片化的证据，无法捕捉认知状态演化、能力绑定、持久化内存污染以及跨智能体的级联风险传播，亟需一种统一的结构化表示来支撑智能体系统的安全审计。
AI.method: Agent-BOM将智能体系统建模为一个分层属性有向图，将静态能力基座（模型、工具、长期记忆）与动态运行时语义状态（目标、推理轨迹、动作）相分离，并通过语义边和安全属性连接两层，将碎片化执行轨迹转化为可查询的审计路径。在此基础上，提出了基于图查询的路径级风险评估范式，并基于OWASP Agentic Top 10进行了实例化，同时在OpenClaw环境中实现了审计插件以从实时执行中构建Agent-BOM。
AI.result: 在多种代表性真实世界智能体攻击场景下的评估表明，Agent-BOM能够有效重构隐蔽攻击链，包括跨会话记忆投毒与工具滥用、能力供应链劫持与意外代码执行、多智能体生态系统劫持以及特权与信任滥用，验证了其在复杂智能体生态系统中为根因分析和安全裁决提供统一可审计基础的能力。
AI.conclusion: Agent-BOM提供了一种统一且可审计的基础，能够有效支撑复杂智能体生态系统中的根因分析与安全裁决，填补了现有表示机制在语义鸿沟上的空白，为智能体系统的安全审计提供了全新范式。

title: Activation Differences Reveal Backdoors: A Comparison of SAE Architectures
summary: Backdoor attacks on language models pose a significant threat to AI safety, where models behave normally on most inputs but exhibit harmful behavior when triggered by specific patterns. Detecting such backdoors through mechanistic interpretability remains an open challenge. We investigate two sparse autoencoder architectures -- Crosscoders and Differential SAEs (Diff-SAE) -- for isolating backdoor-related features in fine-tuned models. Using a controlled SQL injection backdoor triggered by year-based context ("2024" triggers vulnerable code, "2023" triggers safe code), we evaluate both approaches across LoRA and full-rank fine-tuning regimes on SmolLM2-360M. We find that Diff-SAE consistently and substantially outperforms Crosscoders for backdoor isolation. Diff-SAE achieves a Backdoor Isolation Score (BIS) of 0.40 with perfect precision (1.0) and zero false positive rate across most experimental conditions, while Crosscoders fail almost entirely with BIS below 0.02 in most cases. This performance gap holds across multiple transformer layers (14, 18, 22, 26) and both fine-tuning regimes, with full-rank fine-tuning producing particularly clean backdoor signals. Our results suggest that backdoors manifest as directional activation shifts rather than sparse feature activations, making difference-based representations fundamentally more effective for detection. These findings have important implications for AI safety monitoring and the development of interpretability tools for detecting model manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了两种稀疏自编码器架构（Crosscoders和差分SAE）在检测微调语言模型中后门特征方面的效果，发现差分SAE在隔离后门相关特征上大幅优于Crosscoders，表明后门表现为方向性激活偏移而非稀疏特征激活。
AI.motivation: 后门攻击对语言模型安全构成严重威胁，模型在大多数输入上正常但在特定触发模式下表现出有害行为，而通过机制可解释性检测此类后门仍然是一个开放挑战。
AI.method: 研究比较了两种稀疏自编码器架构——Crosscoders和差分SAE（Diff-SAE），在基于年份上下文（"2024"触发脆弱代码，"2023"触发安全代码）的SQL注入后门场景下，评估了它们在SmolLM2-360M模型上通过LoRA和全秩微调两种范式隔离后门相关特征的能力。
AI.result: Diff-SAE在大多数实验条件下实现了0.40的后门隔离分数（BIS），完美精度（1.0）和零假阳性率，而Crosscoders在大多数情况下的BIS低于0.02；该性能差距在多个Transformer层（14、18、22、26）和两种微调范式下均保持一致，其中全秩微调产生的后门信号尤为干净。
AI.conclusion: 后门表现为方向性激活偏移而非稀疏特征激活，这使得基于差分的表示在检测上更为有效；该发现对AI安全监控和检测模型操纵的可解释性工具开发具有重要意义。

title: PRIMED: Adaptive Modality Suppression for Referring Audio-Visual Segmentation via Biased Competition
summary: Referring Audio-Visual Segmentation (Ref-AVS) seeks to localize and segment target objects in video frames based on visual, auditory, and textual referring cues. The task is challenging because the relevance of different modalities varies across referring expressions and scenes, while existing methods typically treat multimodal cues as homogeneous inputs for fusion, prompting, or reasoning, making them vulnerable to irrelevant or misleading modalities. To address this problem, we propose PRIMED, inspired by the biased competition theory in cognitive neuroscience, which explicitly models both visual perception and language-driven prior modulation, and enables more accurate Ref-AVS by adaptive modality suppression. Specifically, a Modality Prior Decoder first estimates whether the referring expression relies primarily on audio, vision, or their joint interaction, generating a modality prior to adaptively guide high-level attention. A Token Distiller further extracts compact global visual tokens from high-level features and shares them across Competition-aware Cross-modal Fusion modules to provide hierarchical global context. Additionally, we introduce a Spatial-Aware Semantic Alignment loss to further enhance foreground-background discrimination through contrastive learning. Extensive experiments on the Ref-AVS benchmark demonstrate that PRIMED achieves state-of-the-art overall performance.

AI.tldr: PRIMED提出基于认知神经科学中偏竞争理论的自适应模态抑制方法，通过显式建模视觉感知与语言驱动的先验调制，结合令牌蒸馏器与空间感知语义对齐损失，在Ref-AVS基准上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Ref-AVS方法将多模态线索视为同质输入进行融合或推理，缺乏对跨模态相关性的选择性利用，在面对与指代表达或场景不相关、具误导性的模态时表现脆弱，亟需一种能自适应抑制无关模态、突出相关模态的机制。
AI.method: PRIMED受偏竞争理论启发，包含三个核心组件：模态先验解码器（Modality Prior Decoder）估计指代表达主要依赖音频、视觉或两者联合交互，生成模态先验以自适应引导高层注意力；令牌蒸馏器（Token Distiller）从高层特征中提取紧凑全局视觉令牌，跨竞争感知交叉模态融合模块（Competition-aware Cross-modal Fusion）共享以提供层次化全局上下文；空间感知语义对齐损失（Spatial-Aware Semantic Alignment Loss）通过对比学习增强前景-背景判别。
AI.result: 在Ref-AVS基准上的大量实验表明，PRIMED取得了整体最优性能，验证了自适应模态抑制策略在复杂多模态场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将认知神经科学中的偏竞争理论引入多模态分割任务，通过显式建模模态先验与竞争机制，为处理模态相关性动态变化的场景提供了新思路，未来可在更广泛的多模态理解任务中推广该自适应调制框架。

title: Randomness is sometimes necessary for coordination
summary: Full parameter sharing is standard in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) for homogeneous agents. Under permutation-symmetric observations, however, a shared deterministic policy outputs identical action distributions for every agent, making role differentiation impossible. This failure can theoretically be resolved using symmetry breaking among anonymous identical processors, which requires randomness. We propose Diamond Attention, a cross-attention architecture in which each agent samples a scalar random number per timestep, inducing a transient rank ordering that masks lower-ranked peers from agent-to-agent attention while leaving task attention fully unmasked. This realizes a random-bit coordination protocol in a single broadcast round, and the set-based attention enables zero-shot deployment to teams of different sizes. We evaluate across three regimes that isolate when structured randomness matters. On the perfectly symmetric XOR game, our method achieves $1.0$ success while all deterministic baselines plateau near $0.5$. On control coordination tasks, a policy trained on $N=4$ generalizes zero-shot to $N \in [2,8]$. On SMACLite cross-scenario transfer, we achieve zero-shot transfer where standard baselines cannot transfer due to structural limitations. Furthermore, replacing the structured mask with standard dropout-based randomness results in a 0\% win rate, confirming that protocol-space structure, not stochastic noise, is the operative ingredient. https://anonymous.4open.science/r/randomness-137A/

AI.tldr: 提出Diamond Attention，一种基于交叉注意力与随机标量排序掩码的架构，通过单轮广播的随机比特协调协议实现同质智能体在对称观测下的角色分化，并在完全对称任务和零样本迁移场景中显著超越确定性基线方法。
AI.motivation: 在同质智能体的合作多智能体强化学习中，标准做法是采用全参数共享，但在置换对称观测下，共享确定性策略会为所有智能体输出相同的动作分布，导致无法实现角色分化。尽管理论上可以通过匿名相同处理器间的对称性破缺（需要随机性）来解决，但现有方法缺乏有效的随机性利用机制。
AI.method: 提出Diamond Attention，一种交叉注意力架构，每个智能体在每个时间步采样一个标量随机数，通过该随机数诱导瞬态排序，在智能体间的注意力机制中屏蔽排名较低的同伴，同时保留任务注意力的完全可见性。该机制在单轮广播中实现随机比特协调协议，且基于集合的注意力支持零样本部署到不同规模的智能体团队。
AI.result: 在完全对称的XOR游戏中，该方法取得1.0的成功率，而所有确定性基线方法停滞在约0.5。在控制协调任务中，基于N=4训练的策略可零样本泛化到N∈[2,8]。在SMACLite跨场景迁移中实现了标准基线因结构限制无法完成的零样本迁移。用标准dropout随机性替代结构化掩码后胜率为0%，证实协议空间结构而非随机噪声是关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，在对称观测下的同质多智能体系统中，结构化随机性（而非随机噪声）是实现角色分化和零样本迁移的关键因素。Diamond Attention通过简单的随机排序掩码机制，在单轮广播通信中实现了有效的协调协议，为多智能体系统中的对称性破缺提供了一种实用且高效的解决方案。

title: Mean-Pooled Cosine Similarity is Not Length-Invariant: Theory and Cross-Domain Evidence for a Length-Invariant Alternative
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures. Submitted to the Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop at ICML 2026
summary: Mean-pooled cosine similarity is the default metric for comparing neural representations across languages, modalities, and tasks. We establish that this metric is not length-invariant: under the anisotropy that characterizes modern transformer representations, mean-pooled cosine grows monotonically in sequence length, independent of representational content. Empirically, on HumanEvalPack across four code LLMs, the length ratio alone explains $R^2 = 0.52$--$0.75$ of cross-language "Python proximity," while AST depth and shared-token fraction add less than 3% of explained variance beyond length. Substituting Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA) reduces explained variance by 83% and reverses the sign of the length coefficient ($β_{\mathrm{len}}: +0.86 \to -0.37$). The same pattern holds in Mistral-7B on parallel WMT pairs ($R^2 = 0.23$ EN-FR, $R^2 = 0.33$ EN-DE for cosine; $R^2 < 0.01$ for CKA). In CLIP ViT-B/32, mean-pooling reduces the length effect relative to EOS-pooling ($R^2: 0.21 \to {<}0.01$), as predicted by the theory's dependence on anisotropy. We argue that length-invariant metrics such as CKA should be the default for cross-representation comparisons, and that recent claims of cross-lingual representational convergence built on mean-pooled cosine warrant re-examination.

AI.tldr: 本文证明均值池化余弦相似度作为跨语言、跨模态表征比较的默认度量不具有长度不变性：由于Transformer表征的各向异性，该度量随序列长度单调增长。实验表明CKA等长度不变度量应作为替代，且基于均值池化余弦的跨语言表征趋同结论需重新审视。
AI.motivation: 现有研究广泛使用均值池化余弦相似度来比较不同语言、模态或任务下的神经表征，但该度量是否具有长度不变性尚未被严格检验，且当表征存在各向异性时，序列长度可能成为混淆因素，导致跨语言表征趋同等结论不可靠。
AI.method: 论文首先理论分析均值池化余弦相似度因各向异性而随序列长度单调增长的机制；随后在HumanEvalPack数据集上对四种代码LLM进行实验，对比均值池化余弦与Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA)的表现；并在Mistral-7B的WMT平行语料对和CLIP ViT-B/32上进一步验证理论预测。
AI.result: 在HumanEvalPack上，长度比单独解释了"Python邻近性"中R²=0.52–0.75的方差，而AST深度和共享token分数仅增加不到3%；使用CKA后解释方差降低83%，长度系数符号反转（β_len从+0.86变为-0.37）。Mistral-7B上余弦的R²为0.23（EN-FR）和0.33（EN-DE），CKA的R²<0.01。CLIP ViT-B/32中均值池化相比EOS池化将长度效应R²从0.21降至<0.01。
AI.conclusion: 均值池化余弦相似度因各向异性而缺乏长度不变性，不适合作为跨表征比较的默认度量；CKA等长度不变度量应成为首选。基于均值池化余弦得出的跨语言表征趋同结论可能受到长度伪影的干扰，需重新检验。

title: See Tomorrow, Act Today: Foresight-Driven Autonomous Driving
summary: Current end-to-end autonomous driving planners are fundamentally reactive: they condition on historical and present observations to predict future actions. We argue that autonomous agents should instead imagine future scenes before deciding, just as human drivers mentally simulate ``what will happen next" before acting. We introduce ForeSight, a foundation world model centric planning framework that reframes autonomous driving as anticipatory decision-making. Rather than treating world models as auxiliary components, ForeSight makes future scene imagination the primary driver of action prediction. Our approach operates in two stages: (1) generating plausible future visual worlds via a pretrained world model, and (2) planning actions conditioned on these imagined futures. This paradigm shift from ``what should I do now?" to ``what will happen, and how should I respond?" enables genuinely anticipatory rather than reactive planning. By grounding decisions in anticipated contexts rather than present observations alone, ForeSight navigates dynamic, interactive scenarios more effectively. Extensive experiments on NAVSIM and nuScenes demonstrate that explicit future imagination significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art alternatives, validating our foresight-driven approach.

AI.tldr: ForeSight 提出一种以基础世界模型为中心的端到端自主驾驶规划框架，将未来场景想象作为动作预测的主要驱动力，实现从被动反应式规划到前瞻性决策的范式转变，在 NAVSIM 和 nuScenes 上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自主驾驶规划器本质上是反应式的，仅依靠历史与当前观测来预测未来动作，缺乏类似人类驾驶员在行动前模拟"接下来会发生什么"的主动想象能力，导致在动态交互场景中决策能力受限。
AI.method: ForeSight 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段利用预训练的世界模型生成可信的未来视觉场景；第二阶段在这些想象出的未来场景基础上进行动作规划。该框架将世界模型从辅助组件提升为核心决策引擎，使规划过程从"我现在该做什么"转变为"未来会发生什么，我该如何应对"。
AI.result: 在 NAVSIM 和 nuScenes 基准上的大量实验表明，显式的未来想象策略显著优于之前的最先进方法，验证了前瞻驱动型规划在动态交互场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了将未来场景预测作为规划核心环节的可行性与优越性，为自主驾驶从反应式走向真正前瞻式决策提供了新的范式，并指出了将基础世界模型嵌入自主系统的新路径。

title: Extracting Search Trees from LLM Reasoning Traces Reveals Myopic Planning
summary: Large language models (LLMs), especially reasoning models, generate extended chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning that often contains explicit deliberation over future outcomes. Yet whether this deliberation constitutes genuine planning, how it is structured, and what aspects of it drive performance remain poorly understood. In this work, we introduce a new method to characterize LLM planning by extracting and quantifying search trees from reasoning traces in the four-in-a-row board game. By fitting computational models on the extracted search trees, we characterize how plans are structured and how they influence move decisions. We find that LLMs' search is shallower than humans', and that performance is predicted by search breadth rather than depth. Most strikingly, although LLMs expand deep nodes in their traces, their move choices are best explained by a myopic model that ignores those nodes entirely. A causal intervention study where we selectively prune CoT paragraphs further suggests that move selection is driven predominantly by shallow rather than deep nodes. These patterns contrast with human planning, where performance is driven primarily by deep search. Together, our findings reveal a key difference between LLM and human planning: while human expertise is driven by deeper search, LLMs do not act on deep lookahead. This dissociation offers targeted guidance for aligning LLM and human planning. More broadly, our framework provides a generalizable approach for interpreting the structure of LLM planning across strategic domains.

AI.tldr: 本文通过从四子棋游戏中提取和量化搜索树，发现LLM的规划过程较浅，其决策主要由浅层节点而非深层节点驱动，与人类依赖深层搜索的规划模式形成显著对比。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型（尤其是推理模型）在思维链推理中会生成对未来结果的显式推演，但这种推演是否构成真正的规划、其结构如何以及哪些方面驱动了模型性能，目前尚不清楚，缺乏系统性的分析方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的方法来刻画LLM的规划过程，通过在四子棋游戏中从推理轨迹中提取并量化搜索树，并拟合计算模型来分析搜索树的结构及其对落子决策的影响。此外，还进行了因果干预实验，选择性剪枝思维链段落以验证深层和浅层节点的作用。
AI.result: 实验发现，LLM的搜索深度浅于人类，其性能主要由搜索广度而非深度决定。尽管LLM的推理轨迹中包含了深层节点，但其落子选择最好由一个忽略深层节点的短视模型来解释。因果干预实验进一步表明，落子选择主要由浅层节点驱动。这些结果与人类规划模式形成对比，人类的表现主要由深层搜索驱动。
AI.conclusion: 本研究发现LLM与人类规划之间存在关键差异：人类专家依赖于深度搜索，而LLM并不基于深层前向搜索做出决策。这种分离为对齐LLM与人类规划提供了有针对性的指导，所提出的框架也为跨战略领域解释LLM规划结构提供了通用方法。

title: MAVEN: Multi-Agent Verification-Elaboration Network with In-Step Epistemic Auditing
summary: While explicit reasoning trajectories enhance model interpretability, existing paradigms often rely on monolithic chains that lack intermediate verification, allowing early errors to cascade unchecked. This lack of modularity impedes granular auditing and compromises the epistemic trust required for high-stakes applications. We propose MAVEN (Multi-Agent Verification-Elaboration Network with In-Step Epistemic Auditing), a blackboard-inspired framework designed to transform LLMs into deliberate reasoners through explicit role-decoupling. At its core, MAVEN operationalizes an adversarial Skeptic-Researcher-Judge loop, simulating expert deliberation by functionally separating logical defense from factual grounding. Experiments on OpenBookQA, TruthfulQA, HALUEVAL and StrategyQA benchmarks demonstrate that MAVEN delivers superior reasoning quality across four fine-grained metrics. Notably, MAVEN consistently outperforms latent reasoning models such as GEMINI-3.1-Pro and consensus-based baselines (e.g., ReConcile) by generating explicitly structured, modular, and verifiable deliberation trajectories, rather than relying on implicit internal states or post-hoc consensus. Moreover, comprehensive evaluations confirm that MAVEN is fully model-agnostic, serving as a strong and transferable reasoning booster that yields substantial performance improvements across diverse backbone models.

AI.tldr: MAVEN提出了一种黑板式多智能体框架（怀疑者-研究者-法官循环），通过显式角色解耦和逐步认知审计将LLM转变为审慎推理者，在多个基准测试上超越潜在推理模型和基于共识的基线方法，且完全模型无关。
AI.motivation: 现有显式推理范式依赖单一链条且缺乏中间验证机制，导致早期错误级联传播，缺乏模块化能力使得精细审计困难，在高风险应用场景中损害了认知可信度。
AI.method: MAVEN（多智能体验证-精炼网络带逐步认知审计）是一种黑板启发式框架，核心通过对抗性的怀疑者-研究者-法官循环实现角色解耦：怀疑者负责逻辑辩护，研究者负责事实依据，法官进行综合裁决，从而将LLM转变为具备显式结构化、模块化且可验证的审慎推理者。
AI.result: 在OpenBookQA、TruthfulQA、HALUEVAL和StrategyQA四个基准测试上，MAVEN在四个细粒度指标上均展现出更优的推理质量，持续超越GEMINI-3.1-Pro等潜在推理模型和ReConcile等基于共识的基线方法；同时MAVEN完全模型无关，作为通用推理增强器可显著提升不同骨干模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: MAVEN通过显式解耦角色和逐步审计机制有效解决了推理过程中错误级联和缺乏可审计性的问题，其模型无关性和强迁移能力表明这种结构化多智能体协作范式是提升LLM推理可靠性的有效途径，对高风险认知任务具有重要应用价值。

title: Towards multi-modal forgery representation learning for AI-generated video detection and localization
summary: Recent advances in generative AI have democratized video creation at scale. AI-generated videos, including partially manipulated clips across visual and audio channels, pose escalating risks of semantic distortion and misuse, which motivates the need for reliable detection tools. Most existing AI-generated video detectors remain limited by single- or partial-modality of data modeling and the lack of fine-grained temporal forgery localization. To address these challenges, our primary novelty introduces a core architecture that jointly integrates an LMM semantic branch with a spatio-temporal (ST) visual branch and a multi-scale partial-spoof (PS) audio branch. This multi-modal approach enables simultaneous detection and fine-grained temporal localization of partially manipulated AI-generated video forgeries. Extensive experiments show that this approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种多模态架构，联合大语言模型语义分支、时空视觉分支和多尺度部分伪造音频分支，实现对AI生成视频（包括局部篡改）的检测与细粒度时间定位，性能超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成视频检测器大多局限于单模态或部分模态数据建模，且缺乏对细粒度时间伪造定位的能力，难以应对包含视觉和音频通道局部篡改的AI生成视频所带来的语义失真与滥用风险。
AI.method: 核心架构创新性地联合三个分支：大语言模型（LMM）语义分支用于高层语义理解、时空（ST）视觉分支用于空-时特征提取、以及多尺度部分伪造（PS）音频分支用于音频级篡改分析，三者协同实现多模态联合建模与细粒度时间伪造定位。
AI.result: 广泛的实验结果表明，所提出的多模态方法在AI生成视频的检测与局部分类任务上全面优于现有最先进方法，验证了联合语义、视觉和音频多模态信息对提升检测与定位性能的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了多模态联合建模对于检测AI生成视频（尤其是局部篡改视频）的重要性，提出的架构为细粒度时间伪造定位提供了新范式，有助于推动视频取证领域向更全面、更鲁棒的检测方向发展。

title: Agentick: A Unified Benchmark for General Sequential Decision-Making Agents
summary: AI agent research spans a wide spectrum: from RL agents that learn from scratch to foundation model agents that leverage pre-trained knowledge, yet no unified benchmark enables fair comparison across these approaches. We present Agentick, a benchmark for sequential decision-making agents designed to evaluate RL, LLM, VLM, hybrid, and human agents on common ground and to power research on the fundamental challenges of sequential decision-making. Agentick provides 37 procedurally generated tasks across six capability categories, four difficulty levels, and five observation modalities, all exposed through a single Gymnasium-compatible interface. The benchmark ships with a Coding API, oracle reference policies for all tasks, pre-built SFT datasets, a composable agent harness, and a live leaderboard. An evaluation spanning 27 configurations and over 90,000 episodes reveals that no single approach dominates: GPT-5 mini leads overall at 0.309 oracle-normalized score while PPO dominates planning and multi-agent tasks; the reasoning harness multiplies LLM performance by 3-10x; and ASCII observations consistently outperform natural language. These findings highlight the substantial room for improvement that remains across all agent paradigms. Agentick's capability-decomposed, multi-modal design provides the empirical infrastructure needed to drive progress toward general autonomous agents, both as an evaluation framework and as a training ground for RL post-training of foundation models in truly sequential environments.

AI.tldr: Agentick是一个用于公平评估RL、LLM、VLM、混合和人类智能体的统一基准，包含37个程序化生成任务、六种能力类别及多模态观测，实验表明无单一范式占优，GPT-5 mini综合得分最高但PPO在规划和多智能体任务中领先，推理增强框架可将LLM性能提升3-10倍。
AI.motivation: 智能体研究涵盖从零开始学习的RL智能体到利用预训练知识的基础模型智能体，但缺乏统一基准来公平比较这些不同范式，阻碍了对序列决策智能体根本挑战的系统性研究。
AI.method: Agentick提供了37个程序化生成的任务，覆盖六种能力类别、四种难度级别和五种观测模态，所有任务通过统一的Gymnasium兼容接口暴露；配套提供Coding API、所有任务的oracle参考策略、预构建SFT数据集、可组合智能体框架和实时排行榜。
AI.result: 在27种配置、超过90,000个episode的评估中，GPT-5 mini以0.309的oracle归一化得分综合领先，PPO在规划和多智能体任务中占优；推理增强框架将LLM性能提升3-10倍；ASCII观测始终优于自然语言观测。
AI.conclusion: 无单一智能体范式在所有任务中占据主导地位，所有范式仍有显著改进空间；Agentick的能力分解、多模态设计为通用自主智能体的进步提供了评估框架和训练基础设施，尤其支持基础模型在真实序列环境中的RL后训练研究。

title: SOD: Step-wise On-policy Distillation for Small Language Model Agents
summary: Tool-integrated reasoning (TIR) is difficult to scale to small language models due to instability in long-horizon tool interactions and limited model capacity. While reinforcement learning methods like group relative policy optimization provide only sparse outcome-level rewards. Recently, on-policy distillation (OPD) has gained popularity by supplying dense token-level supervision from a teacher on student-generated trajectories. However, our experiments indicate that applying OPD to TIR leads to a critical failure mode: erroneous tool calls tend to cascade across subsequent reasoning steps, progressively amplifying student-teacher divergence and rendering the teacher's token-level supervision increasingly unreliable. To address this, we propose SOD, a step-wise on-policy distillation framework for small language model agents, which adaptively reweights distillation strength at each step based on step-level divergence. Therefore, SOD can attenuate potentially misleading teacher signals in high-divergence regions while preserving dense guidance in well-aligned states. Experiments on challenging math, science, and code benchmarks show that SOD achieves up to 20.86% improvement over the second-best baseline. Notably, our 0.6B student achieves 26.13% on AIME 2025, demonstrating effective transfer of agentic reasoning to lightweight models. Our code is available at https://github.com/YoungZ365/SOD.

AI.tldr: 提出SOD（步级蒸馏）框架解决小语言模型在工具集成推理中因错误级联导致教师监督信号失效的问题，通过自适应重加权蒸馏强度，在0.6B模型上实现AIME 2025 26.13%的准确率，并比次优基线提升最高20.86%。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法（如GRPO）仅提供稀疏的结局级奖励，而近期流行的在线策略蒸馏（OPD）虽能提供密集的令牌级监督，但在工具集成推理场景中出现严重失效：错误的工具调用会在后续推理步中级联放大，导致学生与教师模型之间的分歧逐步扩大，使教师提供的令牌级监督信号变得不可靠。
AI.method: 提出SOD（Step-wise On-policy Distillation）框架，在每一步推理中基于步级分歧（step-level divergence）自适应地重新加权蒸馏强度，在高分歧区域衰减可能误导的教师信号，同时在良好对齐的状态下保留密集的教师引导，从而在不牺牲密集监督优势的前提下抑制错误级联。
AI.result: 在数学、科学和代码等多个挑战性基准测试上，SOD相比次优基线取得最高20.86%的提升；0.6B规模的学生模型在AIME 2025上达到26.13%的准确率，证明了将智能体推理能力有效迁移至轻量级模型的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 步级分歧自适应重加权策略有效解决了工具集成推理中在线蒸馏的级联错误问题，为小语言模型在复杂工具交互场景下的能力迁移提供了一条可行路径，代码已开源。

title: Sat3R: Satellite DSM Reconstruction via RPC-Aware Depth Fine-tuning
summary: Accurate Digital Surface Model (DSM) reconstruction from satellite imagery is critical for applications such as disaster response, urban planning, and large-scale geographic mapping. Existing approaches face a fundamental trade-off: optimization-based methods achieve strong accuracy but require hours of per-scene computation, while generalizable geometry foundation models offer near-instant inference but fail to generalize to satellite imagery due to the domain gap introduced by the Rational Polynomial Camera (RPC) model and mismatched depth scale distributions. We present Sat3R, a feed-forward framework that bridges this gap via RPC-aware metric depth fine-tuning of Depth Anything V2 using the Scale-Invariant Logarithmic (SiLog) loss. By constructing physically consistent pseudo depth supervision from RPC geometry, Sat3R adapts a monocular depth foundation model to the satellite domain without per-scene optimization. Experiments on the DFC2019 benchmark demonstrate that Sat3R reduces MAE by 38% over zero-shot feed-forward baselines and achieves competitive accuracy against optimization-based methods, while delivering over 300x speedup. Sat3R demonstrates that feed-forward models, when properly adapted to the satellite domain, can match optimization-based accuracy at a fraction of the computational cost, paving the way for practical large-scale satellite DSM reconstruction.

AI.tldr: Sat3R通过RPC感知的度量深度微调（基于Depth Anything V2和SiLog损失），将单目深度基础模型适配到卫星影像域，无需逐场景优化即可实现与优化方法相当的DSM重建精度，同时获得超过300倍的加速。
AI.motivation: 现有卫星影像DSM重建方法面临根本性权衡：优化方法精度高但每场景需数小时计算，而泛化几何基础模型推理快但无法泛化到卫星影像，原因在于RPC模型引入的域差距和深度尺度分布不匹配。
AI.method: 提出Sat3R前馈框架，通过对Depth Anything V2进行RPC感知的度量深度微调（使用尺度不变对数SiLog损失），利用从RPC几何构造的物理一致的伪深度监督，使单目深度基础模型适应卫星域，无需任何逐场景优化。
AI.result: 在DFC2019基准上，Sat3R相比零样本前馈基线降低MAE 38%，达到与优化方法竞争的精度，同时实现超过300倍的推理加速。
AI.conclusion: 证明前馈模型在适当适配卫星域后，能够以极低计算成本匹配优化方法的DSM重建精度，为大规模实用化卫星DSM重建铺平道路。

title: Beyond the Black Box: Interpretability of Agentic AI Tool Use
summary:
AI agents are promising for high-stakes enterprise workflows, but dependable deployment remains limited because tool-use failures are difficult to diagnose and control. Agents may skip required tool calls, invoke tools unnecessarily, or take actions whose consequence becomes visible only after execution. Existing observability methods are mostly external: prompts reveal correlations, evaluations score outputs, and logs arrive only after the model has already acted. In long-horizon settings, these failures are especially costly because an early tool mistake can alter the rest of the trajectory, increase token consumption, and create downstream safety and security risk.
  We introduce a mechanistic-interpretability toolkit built on Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) and linear probes. The framework reads model states before each action and infers both whether a tool is needed and how consequential the next tool action is likely to be. By decomposing activations into sparse features, it identifies the internal layers and features most associated with tool decisions and tests their functional importance through feature ablation. We train the probes on multi-step trajectories from the NVIDIA Nemotron function-calling dataset and apply the same workflow to GPT-OSS 20B and Gemma 3 27B models.
  The goal is not to replace external evaluation, but to add a missing layer: visibility into what the model signaled internally before action. This helps surface deeper causes of agent failure, especially in long-horizon runs where an early mistake can reshape the rest of the agentic interaction. More broadly, the paper shows how mechanistic interpretability can support practical internal observability for monitoring tool calls and risk in agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于稀疏自编码器和线性探针的机制可解释性工具包，通过对模型内部状态进行特征分解与探测，实现对AI智能体工具调用行为的内部可观测性，帮助在长程任务中诊断和预防因工具使用错误导致的执行失败和安全隐患。
AI.motivation: 现有AI智能体部署中，工具调用失败（如遗漏、误用或后果难以预判）难以诊断和控制，现有的可观测性方法（如提示分析、输出评分、外部日志）均为事后或外部手段，无法在模型动作前捕获其内部决策信号；尤其在长程任务中，早期工具调用错误会扰动后续轨迹、增加token消耗并引发安全风险，亟需对智能体内部工具决策机制的可视化能力。
AI.method: 该方法构建了一个基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）和线性探针的机制可解释性工具包，通过在每个动作前读取模型状态，从中推断是否需要工具以及下一步工具调用的后果严重程度；利用SAE将激活分解为稀疏特征，定位与工具决策最相关的内部层和特征，并通过特征消融测试其功能重要性；探针在NVIDIA Nemotron函数调用数据集的多步轨迹上训练，并应用于GPT-OSS 20B和Gemma 3 27B模型。
AI.result: 该工作展示了机制可解释性可在工具决策前提供模型内部信号的可视化能力，弥补了外部评估的盲区；在长程任务中，该方法能够暴露早期错误如何重塑智能体交互轨迹，从而辅助识别深层失败原因；探针训练基于Nemotron数据集的完整多步轨迹，并在两种不同规模的开源模型上验证了工作流的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献在于为AI智能体系统增加了一个长期缺失的内部可观测性层，使开发者能够在动作执行前了解模型内部关于工具使用的信号；这有助于在长程运行中揭示智能体失败的深层机制原因，并表明机制可解释性可有效支持对工具调用和风险的实用内部监控，而不是取代外部评估方法。

title: Chain-based Distillation for Effective Initialization of Variable-Sized Small Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance but remain costly to deploy in resource-constrained settings. Training small language models (SLMs) from scratch is computationally expensive, while conventional knowledge distillation requires repeated access to large teachers for different target sizes, leading to poor scalability. To solve these problems, we propose \textbf{Chain-based Distillation (CBD)}, a scalable paradigm for efficiently initializing variable-sized language models. A sparse and limited sequence of intermediate models (called anchors) is constructed via stepwise distillation, forming a distillation chain that progressively transfers knowledge from the source LLMs. To support heterogeneous settings, we introduce \emph{bridge distillation} for cross-architecture and cross-vocabulary transfer. Models of variable sizes are initialized via parameter interpolation between adjacent anchors, eliminating repeated large teacher inference. Experiments show that the proposed method substantially improves efficiency and downstream performance. A 138M-parameter SLM without recovery pre-training, outperforms scratch-trained models on a 10B-token corpus on the specific task.
