CBD also demonstrates versatility in heterogeneous settings for initialize models with different architectures and vocabularies.

AI.tldr: 提出链式蒸馏（CBD）范式，通过构建稀疏的中间模型蒸馏链并利用参数插值初始化变尺寸语言模型，在无需反复访问大型教师模型的情况下高效迁移知识，显著提升小模型训练效率与下游性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在资源受限场景下部署成本高昂，小语言模型从头训练计算开销大，传统知识蒸馏针对不同目标尺寸需反复访问大型教师模型，可扩展性差，亟需一种高效、可扩展的变尺寸语言模型初始化方法。
AI.method: 提出链式蒸馏（CBD）范式，通过逐步蒸馏构建一个稀疏且有限的中间模型序列（称为锚点），形成渐进式知识蒸馏链；引入桥接蒸馏机制实现跨架构和跨词表的异构知识迁移；变尺寸模型则通过相邻锚点之间的参数插值进行初始化，从而消除对大型教师模型的重复推理需求。
AI.result: 在100亿词元的语料上，一个138M参数的小语言模型无需恢复预训练，仅通过CBD初始化即在下游任务上超越从头训练的模型；CBD还展示了在异构设置下初始化不同架构和词表模型的通用能力。
AI.conclusion: 链式蒸馏范式通过渐进式蒸馏链与参数插值机制，在显著提升效率的同时保持了良好的下游性能，为资源受限场景下的变尺寸语言模型部署提供了可扩展的解决方案，且支持跨架构和跨词表的知识迁移。

title: From Clouds to Hallucinations: Atmospheric Retrieval Hijacking in Remote Sensing Vision-Language RAG
summary: Multimodal RAG systems increasingly rely on vision-language retrievers to ground visual queries in external textual evidence. Existing adversarial studies on RAG mainly manipulate the retrieval corpus or memory, while attacks on vision-language and remote sensing models typically target end-task predictions. Input-space threats to the evidence retrieval stage of remote sensing multimodal RAG remain underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce CloudWeb, an atmospheric retrieval hijacking attack that modifies only the input image while keeping the retriever, generator, and knowledge base fixed at deployment. CloudWeb overlays parameterized cloud- and haze-like patterns on remote sensing images and optimizes them with a retrieval-oriented objective that pulls adversarial image embeddings toward target atmospheric evidence, suppresses source-scene evidence, enforces rank separation, and regularizes naturalness and coverage. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study of retrieval-stage atmospheric evidence hijacking in remote sensing multimodal RAG. We evaluate CloudWeb on a seven-dataset remote sensing RAG benchmark with five CLIP-style retrievers, including GeoRSCLIP, RemoteCLIP, OpenAI CLIP, and OpenCLIP, together with downstream vision-language generators. Across retrievers, CloudWeb consistently outperforms clean retrieval, handcrafted atmospheric baselines, random cloud perturbations, and fixed variants in injecting weather-related evidence into top-ranked results. On GeoRSCLIP ViT-B/32, Weather@5 increases from 0.71\% to 43.29\%. Downstream generation further shows measurable weather hallucination and semantic shift, indicating that retrieval-stage hijacking can propagate to the final RAG response. These findings reveal a practical failure mode: natural-looking atmospheric changes can compromise evidence retrieval before generation begins.

AI.tldr: CloudWeb提出了一种针对遥感多模态RAG系统的检索劫持攻击，通过在输入图像上叠加参数化的云/雾模式并优化检索导向目标函数，实现了在保持检索器、生成器和知识库不变的情况下将对抗性图像嵌入拉向目标气象证据，实验表明该方法在多个CLIP风格检索器上显著提升了气象相关证据的TOP-K命中率并导致下游生成出现气象幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗性研究主要针对RAG系统的检索语料库或记忆进行操纵，或直接攻击视觉语言模型和遥感模型的最终预测任务，而针对遥感多模态RAG系统在证据检索阶段的输入空间攻击尚未被探索，存在研究空白。
AI.method: CloudWeb在输入遥感图像上叠加参数化的云状和雾状图案，并通过一个检索导向的目标函数进行优化，该函数同时包含多个约束项：将对抗性图像嵌入拉向目标大气证据、抑制源场景证据、强制排序分离以及正则化自然性和覆盖度，攻击过程中检索器、生成器和知识库均保持固定。
AI.result: 在包含七个数据集的遥感RAG基准测试中，针对GeoRSCLIP、RemoteCLIP、OpenAI CLIP和OpenCLIP等五种CLIP风格检索器，CloudWeb在注入气象相关证据到排名结果方面一致优于干净检索、手工大气基线、随机云扰动和固定变体等对比方法，其中在GeoRSCLIP ViT-B/32上Weather@5从0.71%提升至43.29%，且下游生成出现可观测的气象幻觉和语义漂移。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了遥感多模态RAG系统存在一种实用的失败模式：自然外观的大气变化可以在下游生成开始之前就破坏证据检索的可靠性，且检索阶段的劫持会传播至最终RAG响应，这对遥感RAG系统的安全性评估和防御提出了新的挑战。

title: Learning and Reusing Policy Decompositions for Hierarchical Generalized Planning with LLM Agents
summary: We present a dynamic policy-learning approach that combines generalized planning and hierarchical task decomposition for LLM-based agents. Our method, Hierarchical Component Learning for Generalized Policies (HCL-GP ), learns parameterized policies that generalize across task instances and automatically extracts reusable components from successful executions, organizing them into a component library for compositional policy generation. We address three challenges: (1) learning components through automated decomposition, (2) generalizing components to maximize reuse, and (3) efficient retrieval via semantic search. Evaluated on the AppWorld benchmark, our approach achieves 98.2% accuracy on normal tasks and 97.8% on challenge tasks with unseen applications, improving 15.8 points over static synthesis on challenging scenarios. For open-source models, dynamic reuse enables 62.5% success versus near-zero without reuse. This demonstrates that classical planning concepts can be effectively integrated with LLM agents for improved accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合经典规划概念与LLM智能体的动态策略学习方法HCL-GP，通过层次化任务分解和可复用组件库实现策略泛化，在AppWorld基准上达到98.2%的准确率，并将开源模型的成功率从接近零提升至62.5%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体在面对未见过的任务实例时缺乏泛化能力，静态合成方法在挑战性场景下性能严重不足，且缺乏将成功执行经验抽象为可复用组件的机制，导致每次推理都需要从头规划。
AI.method: 提出HCL-GP框架，通过自动化层次化任务分解从成功执行中学习参数化策略并提取可复用组件，构建组件库；利用语义搜索实现高效组件检索，支持组合式策略生成，从而在任务实例间实现策略泛化。
AI.result: 在AppWorld基准上，HCL-GP在常规任务上达到98.2%准确率，在包含未见应用的挑战任务上达到97.8%，相比静态合成方法提升15.8个百分点；对于开源模型，动态组件复用将成功率从近乎为零提升至62.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证实了经典规划中的泛化规划和层次化分解概念能够有效集成到LLM智能体中，显著提升其在复杂、未见场景下的准确性和效率，为将符号规划思想与神经方法结合提供了有效路径。

title: MatryoshkaLoRA: Learning Accurate Hierarchical Low-Rank Representations for LLM Fine-Tuning
summary: With the rise in scale for deep learning models to billions of parameters, the computational cost of fine-tuning remains a significant barrier to deployment. While Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become the standard for parameter-efficient fine-tuning, the need to set a predefined, static rank $r$ requires exhaustive grid searches to balance efficiency and performance. Existing rank-adaptive solutions such as DyLoRA mitigate this by sampling ranks during the training from a predefined distribution. However, they often yield sub-optimal results at higher ranks due to lack of consistent gradient signals across the full hierarchy of ranks, thus making these methods data-inefficient. In this paper, we propose MatryoshkaLoRA, a general, Matryoshka-inspired training framework for LoRA that learns accurate hierarchical low-rank representations by inserting a fixed, carefully crafted diagonal matrix $P$ between the existing LoRA adapters to scale their sub-ranks accordingly. By introducing this simple modification, our general framework recovers LoRA and DyLoRA only by changing $P$ and ensures all sub-ranks embed the available gradient information efficiently. Our MatryoshkaLoRA supports dynamic rank selection with minimal degradation in accuracy. We further propose Area Under the Rank Accuracy Curve (AURAC), a metric that consistently evaluates the performance of hierarchical low-rank adapters. Our results demonstrate that MatryoshkaLoRA learns more accurate hierarchical low-rank representations than prior rank-adaptive approaches and achieves superior accuracy-performance trade-offs across ranks on the evaluated datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/IST-DASLab/MatryoshkaLoRA.

AI.tldr: MatryoshkaLoRA提出一种基于俄罗斯套娃思想的新型训练框架，通过在LoRA适配器之间插入固定对角矩阵P来学习层次化低秩表示，支持动态秩选择且精度损失极小，并提出了新的评估指标AURAC。
AI.motivation: 现有LoRA方法需要预设静态秩r并通过穷举网格搜索来平衡效率与性能，而DyLoRA等秩自适应方法虽然在训练过程中对秩进行采样，但由于无法在整个秩层次上获得一致的梯度信号，导致较高秩时性能次优且数据效率低下。
AI.method: MatryoshkaLoRA在LoRA的A和B适配器之间插入一个精心构建的固定对角矩阵P，通过对子秩进行缩放来学习准确的层次化低秩表示；该框架通过仅改变P即可恢复LoRA和DyLoRA，确保所有子秩都能高效嵌入可用梯度信息；同时提出了AURAC指标用于统一评估层次化低秩适配器的性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，MatryoshkaLoRA相比先前的秩自适应方法学习了更准确的层次化低秩表示，在多种评估数据集上实现了各秩下更优的精度-性能权衡。
AI.conclusion: MatryoshkaLoRA通过简单的矩阵插入操作实现了对不同子秩的高效梯度利用，为参数高效微调提供了一个通用且有效的动态秩选择框架，未来可进一步推广至更广泛的低秩适配场景。

title: Amortized-Precision Quantization for Early-Exit Vision Transformers
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong performance across vision tasks, yet their deployment with low-precision early exiting remains fragile. Existing quantization methods assume static full-depth execution, making them unstable when exit decisions are perturbed by quantization noise, which can amplify errors along dynamic inference paths. In this paper, we introduce Amortized-Precision Quantization (APQ), a utilization-aware formulation that accounts for layer-wise stochastic exposure to quantization noise and reveals depth-precision trade-offs. Building on APQ, we propose Mutual Adaptive Quantization with Early Exiting (MAQEE), a bi-level framework that jointly optimizes exit thresholds and bit-widths under explicit risk control to improve inference stability. MAQEE establishes a superior Pareto frontier in the accuracy-efficiency trade-off, reducing BOPs by up to 95% while maintaining accuracy and outperforming strong baselines by up to 20\% across classification, detection, and segmentation tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为MAQEE的双层量化框架，通过联合优化退出阈值和位宽，在显式风险控制下提高视觉Transformer动态推理的稳定性，在准确率-效率权衡中建立了更优的Pareto前沿，BOPs最高降低95%，准确率提升最高达20%。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer在低精度早期退出场景下部署时性能脆弱，现有量化方法假设全深度静态执行，未考虑量化噪声扰动退出决策时沿动态推理路径放大误差的问题，缺乏对深度-精度权衡的系统性建模。
AI.method: 首先提出摊销精度量化（APQ），一种利用率感知的建模方法，从理论上刻画逐层对量化噪声的随机暴露程度并揭示深度-精度权衡关系；在此基础上提出MAQEE双层框架，联合优化退出阈值和位宽，在显式风险控制下同时提升推理稳定性与效率。
AI.result: MAQEE在准确率-效率权衡上建立了更优的Pareto前沿，相比强基线方法，在分类、检测和分割任务中BOPs最多降低95%的同时保持准确率，性能提升最高达20%。
AI.conclusion: 通过将量化噪声与早期退出动态决策耦合建模，揭示了深度-精度之间的内在权衡关系，MAQEE框架证明了对量化扰动具有鲁棒性的动态推理路径可控性是实现高效视觉Transformer部署的关键。

title: The Context Gathering Decision Process: A POMDP Framework for Agentic Search
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are deployed in complex environments -- such as massive codebases, enterprise databases, and conversational histories -- where the relevant state far exceeds their context windows. To navigate these spaces, an agent must iteratively explore the environment to find relevant information. However, without explicit infrastructure, an agent's working memory can degrade into lossy representations of the search state, resulting in redundant work (e.g. repetitive looping) and premature stopping. In this work, we formalize this challenge as the Context Gathering Decision Process (CGDP), a specialized Partially Observable Markov Decision Process, where an agent's objective is to adaptively refine its belief state to isolate the necessary information for a task. We model an LLM's behavior as approximate Thompson Sampling within this CGDP, and introduce a predicate-based method that decomposes an LLM's implicit search into explicit and modular operations. We then derive two plug-and-play interventions for iterative LLM agents: a persistent, predicate-based belief state that bounds context while preserving multi-hop reasoning, and a programmatic exhaustion gate that halts unproductive search without premature stopping. Across four methods and three question-answering domains, we empirically validate that replacing an LLM's implicit state with our CGDP-motivated belief state improves multi-hop reasoning by up to $11.4\%$; while the modular programmatic exhaustion detection saves up to $39\%$ of tokens without any degradation in agent performance. Ultimately, we argue that framing the LLM agent loop as a CGDP can guide the design of modular, non-interfering improvements to agentic search harnesses.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化了大模型智能体在复杂环境中的上下文收集过程为上下文收集决策过程（CGDP），并提出基于谓词的状态表示与程序化穷举检测两项即插即用干预，在保持多跳推理能力的同时减少冗余搜索和令牌消耗。
AI.motivation: 大模型智能体在代码库、企业数据库等复杂环境中工作时，相关状态远超其上下文窗口，必须通过迭代探索来寻找信息；然而缺乏显式基础设施时，智能体的工作记忆会退化为有损的搜索状态表示，导致重复循环和过早停止等冗余行为，因此需要形式化该挑战并提出有效干预手段。
AI.method: 本文将大模型智能体的迭代搜索过程形式化为上下文收集决策过程（CGDP），一种特殊的部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程，并将LLM的行为建模为CGDP下的近似汤普森采样。在此基础上提出基于谓词的方法，将隐式搜索分解为显式模块化操作，进而设计两种即插即用干预：持久化的基于谓词的信念状态（在有限上下文内保持多跳推理能力），以及程序化穷举检测门（在无性能损失的前提下终止无效搜索）。
AI.result: 在四种方法和三个问答领域的实验中，用CGDP引导的信念状态替代LLM的隐式状态使多跳推理准确率提升最高11.4%；程序化穷举检测在不降低智能体性能的前提下节省最多39%的令牌消耗。
AI.conclusion: 将大模型智能体循环框架化为CGDP可以指导设计模块化、无干扰的搜索改进；基于谓词的显式状态表示和程序化终止机制能有效提升搜索效率与推理能力，为构建更可靠的LLM智能体系统提供了形式化基础。

title: CA-SQL: Complexity-Aware Inference Time Reasoning for Text-to-SQL via Exploration and Compute Budget Allocation
summary: While recent advancements in inference-time learning have improved LLM reasoning on Text-to-SQL tasks, current solutions still struggle to perform well on the most challenging tasks in the Bird-Bench (BIRD) benchmark. This is due to inadequate solution space exploration, which is necessary to uncover promising candidate queries that can be further refined to produce the correct output. To address this challenge, we introduce CA-SQL, a novel Text-to-SQL pipeline that utilizes the estimated difficulty of a task to dynamically scale the breadth of the exploration for generating solution candidates. In addition, we use a custom prompt seeding method, based on principles of evolutionary search, to further elicit exploratory behavior from the base LLM and a novel voting method to select the best candidate solution at the end of the search. Experiments demonstrate that our solution achieves a state-of-the-art score of 51.72% on the "challenging" tier of BIRD development set problems, using only GPT-4o-mini, out-performing other in-context learning approaches, even those that leverage larger models. Overall, our method attains a competitive 61.06% execution accuracy and 68.77% Soft F1 score on the BIRD development dataset.

AI.tldr: CA-SQL提出了一种基于任务难度动态扩展候选查询搜索空间的Text-to-SQL流水线，结合进化搜索启发的自定义提示播种和新型投票机制，在BIRD基准的困难子集上以GPT-4o-mini达到了51.72%的准确率，超越了包括更大模型在内的其他上下文学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有推理时学习方法在Text-to-SQL任务上虽取得进展，但在BIRD基准中最具挑战性的任务上表现不佳，根本原因在于解空间探索不充分，难以发现可进一步精炼产生正确输出的有前途候选查询。
AI.method: CA-SQL提出了一种新型Text-to-SQL流水线，利用任务预估难度动态扩展候选生成时的探索广度；同时采用基于进化搜索原理的自定义提示播种方法增强基础LLM的探索行为，并设计了一种新颖的投票机制在搜索结束时选择最佳候选解。
AI.result: 在BIRD开发集的"困难"子集上，CA-SQL使用GPT-4o-mini取得了51.72%的最新最优准确率，超越了其他上下文学习方法（包括使用更大模型的方法）；在完整BIRD开发数据集上达到61.06%的执行准确率和68.77%的Soft F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，通过动态调整探索广度并结合进化搜索启发式策略，即使使用相对较小的基础模型也能在极具挑战性的Text-to-SQL任务上取得领先性能，验证了结构化解空间探索对于复杂推理任务的重要性。

title: ShellfishNet: A Domain-Specific Benchmark for Visual Recognition of Marine Molluscs
summary: The decline of global shellfish biodiversity poses a severe threat to coastal ecosystems. Although artificial intelligence (AI) technologies show potential for automated ecological monitoring, existing marine benthic datasets often lack adaptation to the complexities of real underwater environments (e.g., variable lighting conditions and diverse species postures), posing challenges for the robust generalization of vision models in practical ecological monitoring. To address this problem, we construct ShellfishNet, a comprehensive image benchmark dataset designed specifically for real-world ecological monitoring constraints. Comprising 8,691 images across 32 taxa, this dataset includes a curated subset annotated with descriptive captions. It is constructed through field photography and web scraping, encompassing samples from complex real-world environments. Based on this benchmark, we systematically evaluate 80 representative neural network models, including Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Vision Transformers (ViTs), State Space Models (SSMs), and Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods. Furthermore, we evaluate the performance of fine-grained visual categorization (FGVC) models and investigate the image captioning capabilities of several mainstream multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Meanwhile, we introduce image corruption benchmark tests to simulate common underwater degradation scenarios (turbidity, severe weather) and assess the robustness of vision models, enabling trustworthy decisions on ecological protection in the wild. ShellfishNet is dedicated to providing a data foundation and a model-evaluation benchmark for the intelligent monitoring of benthic organisms.

AI.tldr: 提出ShellfishNet基准数据集（8,691张图像，32个分类单元），系统评估了80种视觉模型（CNN、ViT、SSM、SSL）在真实水下环境下的细粒度分类与鲁棒性表现，并引入图像损坏测试模拟水下退化场景，为底栖生物智能监测提供数据基础与评估标准。
AI.motivation: 全球贝类生物多样性下降对沿海生态系统构成严重威胁，尽管AI技术在自动化生态监测中展现出潜力，但现有海洋底栖数据集缺乏对真实水下环境复杂性（如光照变化、物种姿态多样）的适配，导致视觉模型在实际生态监测中的鲁棒泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 构建了ShellfishNet基准数据集，包含8,691张涵盖32个分类单元的图像，通过实地拍摄与网络爬取采集，并包含带描述性标注的精选子集；在此基础上系统评估了80种代表性神经网络模型，涵盖CNN、ViT、SSM及自监督学习方法，同时评估了细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）模型和主流多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的图像描述能力，并引入图像损坏基准测试以模拟水下退化场景（如浑浊、恶劣天气）。
AI.result: 基于ShellfishNet基准，系统评估了80种视觉模型在真实水下环境中的表现，涵盖多种架构（CNN、ViT、SSM、SSL），并测试了FGVC模型和MLLM的图像描述能力；图像损坏基准测试揭示了不同模型在模拟水下退化场景（浑浊、恶劣天气）下的鲁棒性差异，为可信生态保护决策提供了依据。
AI.conclusion: ShellfishNet为底栖生物的智能监测提供了专门适配真实水下环境的数据基础与模型评估基准，其引入的图像损坏测试有助于评估视觉模型在野外环境下的鲁棒性，推动AI在生态保护中的可信应用。

title: Switchcraft: AI Model Router for Agentic Tool Calling
summary: Agentic AI systems that invoke external tools are powerful but costly, leading developers to default to large models and overspend inference budgets. Model routing can mitigate this, but existing routers are designed for chat completion rather than tool use. We present Switchcraft, the first (to the best of our knowledge) model router optimized for agentic tool calling. Switchcraft operates inline, selecting the lowest-cost model subject to correctness. We construct an evaluation framework on five function-calling benchmarks and train a DistilBERT-based classifier, deployed under a latency budget. Switchcraft achieves 82.9% accuracy -- matching or exceeding the best individual model -- while reducing inference cost by 84%, saving over $3,600 per million queries. We find that larger models do not consistently outperform smaller ones on tool-use tasks, and that nominally cheaper models can incur higher total cost due to token-intensive reasoning. Our work enables cost-aware agentic AI deployment without sacrificing correctness.

AI.tldr: Switchcraft 是首个面向智能体工具调用的模型路由器，基于 DistilBERT 分类器进行在线路由选择，在五项基准测试上以 82.9% 的准确率匹配或超越最佳单一模型，同时降低 84% 的推理成本，每百万查询节省超 3,600 美元。
AI.motivation: 现有 Agentic AI 系统在调用外部工具时默认使用大型模型，导致推理预算严重超支；模型路由技术虽可用于优化成本，但已有路由器专为对话补全设计，缺乏针对工具调用场景的优化方案。
AI.method: Switchcraft 提出一种在线模型路由方法，基于 DistilBERT 训练二分类器，在每次工具调用请求时动态选择满足正确性的最低成本模型；构建包含五个函数调用基准的评估框架，并在延迟预算约束下部署路由系统。
AI.result: Switchcraft 在五项函数调用基准上达到 82.9% 的准确率，与最佳单一模型相当或更优；推理成本降低 84%，每百万查询节省超过 3,600 美元。实验还发现，大型模型在工具调用任务中并非始终优于小型模型，且名义上更便宜的模型可能因推理 token 消耗过多而导致总成本更高。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，针对工具调用场景设计的轻量级路由模型能够在保持任务正确性的前提下显著降低推理成本，提示开发者应重新审视模型规模与工具调用能力之间的非单调关系，为成本感知的 Agentic AI 部署提供了实用方向。

title: The Memory Curse: How Expanded Recall Erodes Cooperative Intent in LLM Agents
summary: Context window expansion is often treated as a straightforward capability upgrade for LLMs, but we find it systematically fails in multi-agent social dilemmas. Across 7 LLMs and 4 games over 500 rounds, expanding accessible history degrades cooperation in 18 of 28 model--game settings, a pattern we term the memory curse. We isolate the underlying mechanism through three analyses. First, lexical analysis of 378,000 reasoning traces associates this breakdown with eroding forward-looking intent rather than rising paranoia. We validate this using targeted fine-tuning as a cognitive probe: a LoRA adapter trained exclusively on forward-looking traces mitigates the decay and transfers zero-shot to distinct games. Second, memory sanitization holds prompt length fixed while replacing visible history with synthetic cooperative records, which restores cooperation substantially, proving the trigger is memory content, not length alone. Finally, ablating explicit Chain-of-Thought reasoning often reduces the collapse, showing that deliberation paradoxically amplifies the memory curse. Together, these results recast memory as an active determinant of multi-agent behavior: longer recall can either destabilize or support cooperation depending on the reasoning patterns it elicits.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大语言模型在多代理社会困境中扩展上下文窗口会系统性地破坏合作行为，提出"记忆诅咒"现象，并通过词法分析、记忆消毒和思维链消融实验揭示其机制在于记忆内容引发的远见意图侵蚀而非记忆长度本身。
AI.motivation: 上下文窗口扩展通常被视为大语言模型能力的直接提升，但其在多代理社会困境中的影响尚未被系统研究——该文旨在揭示扩展可访问历史记忆对多智能体合作行为的实际作用机制。
AI.method: 该文在7个LLM和4种博弈场景上进行500轮实验；对378,000条推理轨迹进行词法分析；使用仅基于前瞻性推理轨迹训练的LoRA适配器作为认知探针进行微调；通过记忆消毒（用合成合作记录替换可见历史）分离记忆内容与长度的影响；对显式思维链推理进行消融实验。
AI.result: 在28个模型-博弈设定中，扩展历史记忆导致18个出现合作退化（记忆诅咒）；词法分析表明退化源于前瞻性意图的侵蚀而非偏执加剧；记忆消毒实验证明触发因素是记忆内容而非长度；LoRA微调可缓解退化并零样本迁移到不同博弈；消除思维链推理通常能减轻记忆诅咒。
AI.conclusion: 记忆是多代理行为的一个主动决定因素：更长的上下文并非必然有益，其效果取决于所引发的推理模式；远见性推理意图的维持是合作稳定性的关键，而显式推理放大记忆诅咒的现象质疑了"更多推理总是更好"的假设。

title: TTF: Temporal Token Fusion for Efficient Video-Language Model
summary: Video-language models (VLMs) face rapid inference costs as visual token counts scale with video length. For example, 32 frames at $448{\times}448$ resolution already yield >8,000 visual tokens in Qwen3-VL, making LLM prefill the dominant throughput bottleneck. Existing methods often rely on global similarity or attention-guided compression, incurring offsets to their gains. We propose \textbf{Temporal Token Fusion (TTF)}, a training-free, plug-and-play pre-LLM token compression framework that exploits structured temporal redundancy in video. TTF automatically selects an anchor frame, then for each subsequent frame, performs a local window similarity search (e.g.,$3\times 3$), fusing tokens that exceed a threshold. The compressed sequence maintains positional consistency across both prefill and decoding through coordinate realignment, enabling seamless integration with existing VLM pipelines. On Qwen3-VL-8B with threshold t=0.70, TTF removes about 67\% of visual tokens while retaining 99.5\% of the baseline accuracy and introducing only ${\approx}0.16$\,GFLOPs of matching overhead. Overall, TTF offers a practical, efficient solution for video understanding. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/Cominder/ttf}{https://github.com/Cominder/ttf}

AI.tldr: 提出时序令牌融合（TTF），一种训练无关的即插即用令牌压缩框架，通过局部窗口相似性搜索融合冗余视觉令牌，在去掉约67%视觉令牌的同时保留99.5%的基线精度，显著加速视频-语言模型推理。
AI.motivation: 视频-语言模型（VLM）面临推理成本随视频长度快速增长的瓶颈问题，例如Qwen3-VL在32帧448×448分辨率下已产生超过8000个视觉令牌，导致LLM预填充阶段成为吞吐量主要瓶颈，而现有压缩方法依赖全局相似性或注意力引导，引入额外开销抵消了压缩收益。
AI.method: TTF是一种训练无关、即插即用的令牌压缩框架，运行于LLM预填充之前。它自动选择一个锚帧，然后对后续每一帧通过局部窗口（如3×3）相似性搜索，将超过阈值的令牌融合为单一令牌，并通过坐标对齐保持预填充和解码阶段的位置一致性，无缝集成现有VLM流水线。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-VL-8B模型上，设置阈值t=0.70时，TTF移除了约67%的视觉令牌，保留了99.5%的基线准确率，仅引入约0.16 GFLOPs的匹配开销，实现了精度与效率的有效平衡。
AI.conclusion: TTF通过利用视频中结构性时序冗余，提供了一种实用高效的视频理解加速方案，其训练无关、即插即用的特性使其易于集成到现有VLM流水线中，为长视频场景下的高效推理提供了可行方向。

title: Repeated Deceptive Path Planning against Learnable Observer
comment: Full version of the extended abstract accepted at AAMAS 2026
summary: We study the problem of deceptive path planning (DPP), where an agent aims to conceal its true destination from external observers. While existing work assumes static, non-learning observers, real-world adversaries-such as in critical goods transportation or military operations-can adapt by learning from historical trajectories. To address this gap, we introduce Repeated Deceptive Path Planning (RDPP), a new formulation that explicitly models learnable observers. We show that existing DPP methods fail under this setting, as they cannot adapt to evolving adversarial predictions. While incorporating observer previous predictions into updates enables some adaptation, such incremental updates cause accumulative lag that degrades deception. To this end, we propose Deceptive Meta Planning (DeMP), a two-level optimization framework that combines episode-level adaptation, which enables short-term policy adjustment to counter updated observer, and meta-level updates, which leverage cross-episode feedback to capture how observers update their models and accelerate adaptation in future episodes. In this way, DeMP mitigates the accumulation of adaptation lag, enabling sustained deception against a learning observer. Experiments across environments demonstrate that DeMP significantly outperforms existing approaches in RDPP while maintaining competitive path cost. Our results highlight the importance of modeling repeated interactions with learnable adversaries, providing new insights into deception and privacy in multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出重复欺骗路径规划（RDPP）问题，并设计了一种名为DeMP的双层元学习框架，使智能体能够持续欺骗具备学习能力的外部观察者，显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有欺骗路径规划（DPP）研究假定外部观察者是静态且非学习的，而现实场景（如关键物资运输或军事行动）中的对手会通过学习历史轨迹来适应。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究智能体如何在与可学习观察者的重复交互中持续隐藏真实目的地。
AI.method: 本文提出重复欺骗路径规划（RDPP）问题形式化，并设计DeMP（Deceptive Meta Planning）框架，采用双层优化结构：内层进行回合级适应（episode-level adaptation），实现对观察者更新的短期策略调整；外层进行元级更新（meta-level updates），利用跨回合反馈捕捉观察者的学习模式，加速未来回合的适应，从而缓解增量更新带来的累积滞后问题。
AI.result: 在多种环境下的实验结果表明，DeMP在RDPP任务中显著优于现有DPP方法，同时保持竞争性的路径代价。现有方法由于无法适应观察者演化预测或在增量更新中产生累积滞后，均无法在RDPP设定下取得持续有效的欺骗效果。
AI.conclusion: 本工作揭示了在可学习对抗者的重复交互情境下欺骗路径规划的关键挑战，强调建模观察者学习过程的重要性，为多智能体系统中的欺骗与隐私问题提供了新的见解和研究方向。

title: UniD-Shift: Towards Unified Semantic Segmentation via Interpretable Share-Private Multimodal Decomposition
summary: Semantic segmentation of large-scale 3D point clouds is crucial for applications such as autonomous driving and urban digital twins. However, the sparse sampling pattern of LiDAR and the view-dependent geometric distortion in image observations complicate cross-modal alignment and hinder stable fusion. Inspired by the fact that 2D images captured by cameras are representations of the 3D world, we recognize that the features learned from 2D and 3D segmentation share some common semantics, while other aspects remain modality-specific. This insight motivates a unified multimodal framework for joint 2D-3D semantic segmentation. We combine a SAM-based vision encoder with a SPTNet-based geometric encoder to extract complementary semantic and geometric representations. The resulting features from both modalities are explicitly decomposed into shared and private subspaces, where the shared components summarize semantic factors common to both domains, and the private components preserve properties that are unique to each modality. A lightweight attention-based fusion module aggregates the shared features into a consistent cross-modal representation, and a regularized training objective ensures both semantic alignment and subspace independence. Experiments on the SemanticKITTI and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements in segmentation accuracy over representative multimodal baselines, accompanied by competitive computational efficiency. Cross-domain evaluation on nuScenes USA-Singapore shows stable performance under distribution shifts, demonstrating strong generalization. The implementation code is publicly available at: https://github.com/shuaizhang69/UniD-Shift.

AI.tldr: 提出UniD-Shift统一多模态框架，通过显式分解2D-3D共享与私有特征子空间实现跨模态对齐，在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes基准上取得一致改进，并展现出跨域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 大规模3D点云语义分割中，LiDAR的稀疏采样模式与图像观测中的视角相关几何畸变导致跨模态对齐困难，阻碍了2D图像与3D点云特征的稳定融合，现有方法难以充分挖掘两种模态间的共享语义与各自独有信息。
AI.method: 提出UniD-Shift统一多模态框架，结合SAM视觉编码器与SPTNet几何编码器分别提取语义与几何特征；将双模态特征显式分解为共享子空间和私有子空间，共享成分总结跨域公共语义因子，私有成分保留模态特有属性；采用轻量级注意力融合模块聚合共享特征为一致跨模态表示，并设计正则化训练目标同时保证语义对齐与子空间独立性。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes基准上，该方法相较于代表性多模态基线在分割精度上取得一致提升，且计算效率具有竞争力；在nuScenes USA-Singapore跨域评估中，该方法在分布偏移下性能稳定，展现出强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了2D与3D语义分割中共享与私有特征分解的有效性，验证了显式跨模态对齐与子空间正则化可显著提升多模态分割性能与跨域鲁棒性，为自动驾驶等场景下的点云-图像融合提供了新思路。

title: Three-in-One World Model: Energy-Based Consistency, Prediction, and Counterfactual Inference for Marketing Intervention
summary: Marketing decisions reflect the interaction of latent consumer heterogeneity, time-varying internal states, and explicit interventions, a structure that current prediction- and language-oriented models do not capture in a unified manner. We propose a Three-in-One world-model architecture in which a Deep Boltzmann Machine (DBM) learns a frozen belief representation from demographics, time, and lagged actions and outcomes, with lightweight task-specific adapters attached on top. The same belief supports three tasks within a single framework: (i) energy-based consistency evaluation through the DBM's free energy, (ii) outcome prediction through adapters, and (iii) counterfactual inference by holding the belief fixed and varying only the action input given to the adapter. Using a controlled simulation in which the latent price sensitivity, promotion responsiveness, and base preference of each consumer are known, we show that the adapters match a strong MLP baseline on visit- and purchase-AUC while recovering heterogeneous treatment effects substantially better than S-, T-, X-, and DR-learner meta-learners and a Causal Forest baseline built on the same raw features, with the largest gap on a confounded price-promotion intervention. Complementing this, free-energy clamps systematically penalize counterfactual purchase trajectories that lack prior promotional exposure, and the penalty itself depends on the latent base preference in the expected direction. These results indicate that DBM beliefs disentangle latent traits in a form that survives counterfactual queries, providing an integrated world-model substrate for marketing intervention.

AI.tldr: 提出一种三合一世界模型架构，将DBM学习的冻结信念表示与轻量级任务适配器结合，在同一框架内统一支持能量一致性评估、结果预测和反事实推断，在模拟营销环境中比多种元学习器更准确地恢复异质处理效应。
AI.motivation: 营销决策反映潜在消费者异质性、时变内部状态和显式干预之间的复杂交互，而现有预测导向和语言导向模型无法以统一方式捕获这一结构。
AI.method: 提出三合一世界模型架构：DBM从人口统计特征、时间和滞后行为与结果中学习冻结的信念表示，并附加轻量级任务特定适配器。同一信念支持三项任务——基于DBM自由能的能量一致性评估、通过适配器的结果预测、以及固定信念仅改变动作输入的反事实推断。
AI.result: 在已知潜在价格敏感度、促销响应度和基础偏好的受控模拟中，适配器在访问和购买AUC上匹配强MLP基线，同时在恢复异质处理效应上显著优于S、T、X、DR-learner元学习器和基于相同原始特征的因果森林基线，在混淆的价格-促销干预上差距最大。自由能钳制系统性地惩罚缺乏先前促销暴露的反事实购买轨迹，且惩罚依赖潜在基础偏好。
AI.conclusion: DBM信念能够以在反事实查询中依然保持的形式解缠潜在特征，为营销干预提供统一的世界模型基础。

title: UniISP: A Unified ISP Framework for Both Human and Machine Vision
summary: Compared to RGB images, raw sensor data provides a richer representation of information, which is crucial for accurate recognition, particularly under challenging conditions such as low-light environments. The traditional Image Signal Processing (ISP) pipeline generates visually pleasing RGB images for human perception through a series of steps, but some of these operations may adversely impact the information integrity by introducing compression and loss. Furthermore, in computer vision tasks that directly utilize raw camera data, most existing methods integrate minimal ISP processing with downstream networks, yet the resulting images are often difficult to visualize or do not align with human aesthetic preferences. This paper proposes UniISP, a novel ISP framework designed to simultaneously meet the requirements of both human visual perception and computer vision applications. By incorporating a carefully designed Hybrid Attention Module (HAM) and employing supervised learning, the proposed method ensures that the generated images are visually appealing. Additionally, a Feature Adapter module is introduced to effectively propagate informative features from the ISP stage to subsequent downstream networks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance across various scenarios and multiple datasets, proving its generalizability and effectiveness.

AI.tldr: UniISP提出了一种统一的ISP框架，通过混合注意力模块和特征适配器，同时满足人类视觉感知和计算机视觉任务的需求，在多个数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ISP流水线为人类视觉生成美观的RGB图像，但其中的压缩和损失操作会破坏信息完整性，不利于下游视觉任务；而现有直接利用raw数据的方法要么整合了最小化ISP处理导致图像难以可视化，要么生成的图像不符合人类审美偏好。因此，需要一种能够同时满足人类视觉感知和计算机视觉应用需求的统一ISP框架。
AI.method: UniISP框架包含两个关键模块：一是精心设计的混合注意力模块（Hybrid Attention Module, HAM），通过监督学习确保生成图像在视觉上美观；二是特征适配器（Feature Adapter）模块，用于将ISP阶段的丰富特征有效地传播到后续下游网络中，从而兼顾视觉质量与任务性能。
AI.result: 在多种场景和多个数据集上的大量实验表明，UniISP达到了最先进的性能水平，验证了其泛化能力和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明，通过合理设计注意力机制和特征适配策略，ISP框架可以同时服务于人类视觉感知和计算机视觉任务，为raw数据在视觉识别中的高效利用提供了新的思路和框架。

title: HMACE: Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Collaborative Evolution for Combinatorial Optimization
summary: Large Language Models have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for automated heuristic design for NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems. Despite this progress, existing LLM-based methods typically rely on monolithic workflows constrained by rigid templates, thereby restricting memory-guided exploration and triggering premature convergence to local optima. To design an autonomous and collaborative architecture, we introduce HMACE, a Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Collaborative Evolution framework that reconceptualizes heuristic search as an organizational design problem. HMACE decomposes each evolutionary generation into an autonomous, role-specialized loop with four coordinated agents: a Proposer for strategy exploration, a Generator for executable heuristic synthesis, an Evaluator for empirical assessment, and a Reflector for archive-backed memory update. By coupling behavior-aware retrieval, lightweight candidate filtering, and fitness-grounded archive updates, HMACE guides the search toward diverse and promising heuristic behaviors while avoiding redundant evaluations. Extensive evaluations on representative COPs, including TSP, Online BPP, MKP, and PFSP, show that HMACE achieves a favorable quality-efficiency trade-off compared to state-of-the-art single-agent and multi-agent baselines. In the matched LLM-driven reference comparison, HMACE achieves the lowest average gaps on TSP and Online BPP (0.464\% and 0.223\%, respectively), while requiring only 0.13M and 0.42M tokens for the two tasks, substantially fewer than the compared baselines.

AI.tldr: HMACE是一个异构多智能体协作进化框架，将启发式搜索重构为组织设计问题，通过角色分工的四个智能体（Proposer、Generator、Evaluator、Reflector）协同工作，在多个NP-hard组合优化问题上实现了优于现有单智能体和多智能体方法的性能与效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动启发式设计方法通常依赖单一工作流和刚性模板，限制了记忆引导的探索能力并容易导致过早收敛到局部最优解，亟需一种自主协作的架构来克服上述局限。
AI.method: HMACE将每一轮进化生成分解为一个自主的、角色专业化的循环，包含四个协调的智能体：Proposer负责策略探索、Generator负责可执行启发式合成、Evaluator负责实证评估、Reflector负责基于归档的记忆更新；通过行为感知检索、轻量级候选过滤和基于适应度的归档更新机制，引导搜索朝向多样且富有前景的启发式行为。
AI.result: 在TSP、Online BPP、MKP和PFSP等多个代表性组合优化问题上的广泛评估表明，HMACE相比最先进的单智能体和多智能体基线实现了更优的质量-效率权衡；在匹配的LLM驱动参考对比中，HMACE在TSP和Online BPP上分别达到最低的平均差距（0.464%和0.223%），同时仅需0.13M和0.42M tokens，远少于对比基线。
AI.conclusion: HMACE通过将启发式搜索建模为多智能体组织设计问题，有效避免了过早收敛并提升了搜索效率，验证了角色专业化与协作记忆机制在自动化启发式设计中的潜力，为NP-hard组合优化问题提供了一种高质量且高效的新范式。

title: Sparse Autoencoders as Plug-and-Play Firewalls for Adversarial Attack Detection in VLMs
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have advanced rapidly and are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, especially with the rise of agent-based systems. However, their safety has received relatively limited attention. Even the latest proprietary and open-weight VLMs remain highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks, leaving downstream applications exposed to significant risks. In this work, we propose a novel and lightweight adversarial attack detection framework based on sparse autoencoders (SAEs), termed SAEgis. By inserting an SAE module into a pretrained VLM and training it with standard reconstruction objectives, we find that the learned sparse latent features naturally capture attack-relevant signals. These features enable reliable classification of whether an input image has been adversarially perturbed, even for previously unseen samples. Extensive experiments show that SAEgis achieves strong performance across in-domain, cross-domain, and cross-attack settings, with particularly large improvements in cross-domain generalization compared to existing baselines. In addition, combining signals from multiple layers further improves robustness and stability. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explore SAE as a plug-and-play mechanism for adversarial attack detection in VLMs. Our method requires no additional adversarial training, introduces minimal overhead, and provides a practical approach for improving the safety of real-world VLM systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）的轻量级对抗攻击检测框架SAEgis，通过在预训练VLM中插入SAE模块，利用学习到的稀疏潜在特征区分对抗扰动图像与正常图像，在无需对抗训练的条件下实现跨领域与跨攻击场景下的鲁棒检测。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLM）在现实应用尤其是智能体系统中部署日益广泛，但其安全性问题受到相对较少的关注，现有的闭源与开源VLM仍高度易受对抗攻击威胁，下游应用面临显著风险。
AI.method: 提出SAEgis框架，在预训练VLM中插入稀疏自编码器（SAE）模块，通过标准重构目标训练SAE，利用其学习到的稀疏潜在特征中自然捕获的攻击相关信号，对输入图像是否受到对抗扰动进行可靠分类，支持多层信号融合以增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SAEgis在域内、跨域和跨攻击场景下均表现出强检测性能，尤其在跨域泛化方面相比现有基线有显著提升，多层信号融合进一步改善了检测的鲁棒性和稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作是首个将SAE作为即插即用机制用于VLM对抗攻击检测的研究，方法无需额外对抗训练、引入极小开销，为提升现实VLM系统安全性提供了一种实用方案。

title: RELO: Reinforcement Learning to Localize for Visual Object Tracking
summary: Conventional visual object trackers localize targets using handcrafted spatial priors, often in the form of heatmaps. Such priors provide only surrogate supervision and are poorly aligned with tracking optimization and evaluation metrics, such as intersection over union (IoU) and area under the success curve (AUC). Here, we introduce RELO, a REinforcement-learning-to-LOcalize method for visual object tracking that formulates target localization as a Markov decision process. Specifically, RELO replaces handcrafted spatial priors with a localization policy learned over spatial positions via reinforcement learning, with rewards combining frame-level IoU and sequence-level AUC. We additionally introduce layer-aligned temporal token propagation to improve semantic consistency across frames, with negligible computational overhead. Across multiple benchmarks, RELO achieves superior results, attaining 57.5% AUC on LaSOText without template updates. This confirms that reward-driven localization provides an effective alternative to prior-driven localization for visual object tracking.

AI.tldr: RELO提出了一种基于强化学习的视觉目标跟踪定位方法，将目标定位建模为马尔可夫决策过程，用策略网络替代手工设计的空间先验，在多个基准上取得领先性能，证实了奖励驱动定位可作为先验驱动定位的有效替代方案。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉目标跟踪器依赖手工设计的空间先验（如热力图）进行目标定位，这些先验仅提供代理监督信号，与跟踪优化目标和评价指标（如IoU和AUC）之间存在严重不对齐，限制了跟踪性能的提升。
AI.method: RELO将目标定位形式化为马尔可夫决策过程，通过强化学习在空间位置上学习定位策略，取代传统的手工空间先验；奖励函数结合了帧级IoU和序列级AUC；同时引入层对齐的时间令牌传播机制以提升帧间语义一致性，且计算开销可忽略不计。
AI.result: 在多个跟踪基准上，RELO取得了优越的结果，在LaSOText基准上无需模板更新即可达到57.5%的AUC，显著优于依赖手工空间先验的传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证实，奖励驱动的定位方法能够有效替代传统先验驱动的定位方法，为视觉目标跟踪提供了一条新的范式路径，表明强化学习与跟踪评价指标的直接对齐是提升跟踪性能的关键方向。

title: Can Agents Price a Reaction? Evaluating LLMs on Chemical Cost Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become increasingly capable as tool-using agents, with benchmarks spanning diverse general agentic tasks. Yet rigorous evaluation of scientific tool use remains limited. In chemistry, recent agents can plan syntheses and invoke domain-specific tools, but evaluations often rely on curated demonstrations, expert assessment, or LLM-as-judge scoring rather than exact, judge-free ground truth. We address this gap with chemical procurement cost estimation, a practical task in which an agent must ground chemical identities, retrieve supplier quotes, select valid purchasable packs, normalize quantities, and compute cost from a reaction description. We introduce ChemCost, a benchmark of 1,427 evaluable reactions grounded to a frozen pricing snapshot covering 2,261 chemicals and 230,775 supplier quotes, supporting scalar scoring and stage-level diagnosis of grounding, retrieval, procurement, and arithmetic failures. To evaluate robustness, we further construct controlled noise-injected views that perturb chemical aliases, quantity expressions, missing fields, and input formatting. Experiments with frontier, open-weight, and chemistry-specialized LLM agents show that tool access is necessary but insufficient for solving the task. The strongest agents reach only 50.6% accuracy within 25% relative error on clean inputs and degrade substantially with realistic noise. Stage-level analysis further shows that failures arise from brittle parsing, ineffective evidence integration, invalid pack selection, and non-convergent tool use.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChemCost，一个基于化学品采购成本估算任务的科学工具使用基准，包含1,427个可评估反应和23万余条供应商报价数据，用于严格评估LLM代理在化学领域工具使用中的表现，实验表明最强代理在干净输入下仅达50.6%的准确率，且面对噪声时性能显著下降。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理在通用任务上的工具使用评估已较为成熟，但在科学领域尤其是化学任务中，评估多依赖人工筛选的演示、专家评判或LLM作为裁判的打分，缺少基于精确地面真值的自动化评估方法，难以客观衡量代理在真实科学场景中的工具使用能力。
AI.method: 本文构建了ChemCost基准，包含1,427个可评估的化学反应，冻结定价快照覆盖2,261种化学品和230,775条供应商报价，支持标量评分和分阶段诊断（识别、检索、采购、算术四个阶段）。为评估鲁棒性，进一步构造了受控噪声注入视图，扰动化学别名、数量表达、缺失字段和输入格式。
AI.result: 对前沿、开源和化学专用LLM代理的实验表明，工具访问是必要但不充分的。最强代理在干净输入下仅达50.6%的准确率（25%相对误差内），在引入现实噪声后性能大幅下降。阶段级分析显示失败源于脆弱的解析、无效的证据整合、不合格的包装选择以及不收敛的工具使用。
AI.conclusion: 本研究表明当前LLM代理在科学工具使用任务中仍存在显著短板，尤其在面对现实输入噪声时鲁棒性不足；分阶段诊断揭示了多个关键失效环节，为未来提升科学代理的推理与工具整合能力提供了明确方向。

title: InterLV-Search: Benchmarking Interleaved Multimodal Agentic Search
summary: Existing benchmarks for multimodal agentic search evaluate multimodal search and visual browsing, but visual evidence is either confined to the input or treated as an answer endpoint rather than part of an interleaved search trajectory. We introduce \textbf{InterLV-Search}, a benchmark for Interleaved Language-Vision Agentic Search, in which textual and visual evidence is repeatedly used to condition later search. It contains 2,061 examples across three levels: active visual evidence seeking, controlled offline interleaved multimodal search, and open-web interleaved multimodal search. Beyond existing benchmarks, it also includes multimodal multi-branch samples that involve comparison between multiple entities during the evidence search. We construct Level 1 and Level 2 with automated pipelines and Level 3 with a machine-led, human-supervised open-web pipeline. We further provide InterLV-Agent for standardized tool use, trajectory logging, and evaluation. Experiments on proprietary and open-source multimodal agents show that current systems remain far from solving interleaved multimodal search, with the best model below 50% overall accuracy, highlighting challenges in visual evidence seeking, search control, and multimodal evidence integration. We release the benchmark data and evaluation code at https://github.com/hbhalpha/InterLV-Search-Bench

AI.tldr: InterLV-Search is a benchmark for interleaved language-vision agentic search where textual and visual evidence recursively conditions subsequent search, containing 2,061 samples across three levels. Experiments show current multimodal agents perform poorly, with the best model achieving under 50% accuracy.
AI.motivation: Existing multimodal agentic search benchmarks treat visual evidence either as static input or as final answer endpoints, lacking the capability to evaluate interleaved search trajectories where textual and visual evidence recursively informs later search steps. This gap prevents systematic assessment of agents' abilities in visual evidence seeking, search control, and multimodal evidence integration.
AI.method: The benchmark spans three difficulty levels: Level 1 (active visual evidence seeking), Level 2 (controlled offline interleaved multimodal search), and Level 3 (open-web interleaved multimodal search), additionally incorporating multimodal multi-branch samples involving cross-entity comparison. Levels 1 and 2 are constructed via automated pipelines, while Level 3 uses a machine-led, human-supervised open-web pipeline, complemented by InterLV-Agent for standardized tool use, trajectory logging, and evaluation.
AI.result: Evaluation of proprietary and open-source multimodal agents on InterLV-Search reveals that current systems remain far from solving interleaved multimodal search, with the best-performing model achieving below 50% overall accuracy, underscoring significant deficiencies in visual evidence seeking, search control, and multimodal evidence integration.
AI.conclusion: InterLV-Search exposes critical limitations of existing multimodal agents in handling interleaved search trajectories, highlighting the need for improved architectures and training paradigms that can recursively integrate textual and visual evidence throughout the search process, and provides a standardized evaluation framework to drive future progress.

title: Exposing and Mitigating Temporal Attack in Deepfake Video Detection
summary: While spatiotemporal deepfake detectors achieve high AUC, our experiments reveal their susceptibility to evasion attacks. These models tend to overfit on fragile temporal spectrum cues, rather than learning robust semantic causality. To mitigate this vulnerability, we propose SpInShield, a temporal spectral-invariant defense framework explicitly designed to decouple semantic motion from manipulatable spectral artifacts. We propose a learnable spectral adversary that dynamically synthesizes severe spectral deformations, simulating extreme attack scenarios. By employing a shortcut suppression optimization strategy, SpInShield compels the encoder to extract reliable forensic cues while purging unstable spectral statistics from the latent space. Experiments show that SpInShield obtains competitive performance on widely used datasets and outperforms the strongest baseline by 21.30 percentage points in AUC under simulated amplitude spectral attacks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpInShield，一种时间频谱不变的深度伪造检测防御框架，通过可学习频谱对抗器与捷径抑制优化策略，解耦语义运动与可操纵频谱伪影，在频谱攻击下AUC比最强基线提升21.30个百分点。
AI.motivation: 现有时空深度伪造检测器虽然AUC表现优异，但实验表明其极易受到规避攻击，根本原因在于模型过度依赖脆弱的时序频谱线索而非学习鲁棒的语义因果关系，因此亟需一种能抵御频谱层面对抗攻击的鲁棒检测方法。
AI.method: SpInShield提出了一种可学习的频谱对抗器，能够动态合成严重的频谱形变以模拟极端攻击场景；同时采用捷径抑制优化策略，迫使编码器提取可靠的取证线索并从隐空间中剔除不稳定的频谱统计量，从而将语义运动与可操纵的频谱伪影进行解耦。
AI.result: 实验表明，SpInShield在多个广泛使用的数据集上取得了竞争力强的检测性能，并且在模拟振幅频谱攻击下，其AUC比最强基线方法高出21.30个百分点，展现了显著的鲁棒性优势。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了深度伪造检测器对时序频谱线索的过拟合脆弱性，并证明了通过解耦语义运动与频谱伪影、结合对抗训练与表征净化策略可有效提升模型在对抗环境下的鲁棒性，为可信赖的伪造检测提供了新思路。

title: Structured Role-Aware Policy Optimization for Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR), especially with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has shown strong potential for improving the reasoning capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs). However, in multimodal reasoning, final-answer rewards are typically assigned at the sequence level and do not distinguish the functional roles of different tokens, making it difficult to determine whether a correct answer is supported by task-relevant visual evidence. In this paper, we revisit multimodal RLVR from the perspective of role-aware token-level credit assignment, where structured responses are decomposed into perception tokens for extracting visual evidence and reasoning tokens for deriving answers from that evidence. Based on this perspective, we propose Structured Role-aware Policy Optimization (SRPO), which refines the sequence-level GRPO advantage into role-aware token-level advantages without changing the reward function. Specifically, SRPO assigns role-specific credit by using self-distilled on-policy contrasts: perception tokens are emphasized according to their visual dependency under original versus corrupted visual inputs, while reasoning tokens are emphasized according to their consistency with the generated perception. These role-specific signals are further unified through a shared trajectory-level baseline, yielding positive token weights that adjust relative update magnitudes while preserving the original GRPO reward and optimization direction, without requiring external reward models or separate teachers. Experiments across diverse multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that SRPO improves evidence-grounded reasoning, highlighting the importance of moving beyond uniform sequence-level credit toward role-aware optimization for reliable multimodal reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出SRPO方法，通过角色感知的token级信用分配替代序列级GRPO优势，在不改变奖励函数的情况下，将感知令牌和推理令牌分别加权，从而提升多模态推理中证据支撑的正确答案质量。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法（如GRPO）在多模态推理中仅分配序列级最终答案奖励，无法区分感知令牌和推理令牌的不同功能角色，导致难以判断正确答案是否真正由任务相关的视觉证据支撑，缺乏细粒度的角色感知信用分配机制。
AI.method: 提出结构化角色感知策略优化（SRPO），在不改变奖励函数的前提下，将序列级GRPO优势分解为角色感知的token级优势：对感知令牌，通过原始与损坏视觉输入下的视觉依赖性对比进行自蒸馏加权；对推理令牌，通过其与生成感知的一致性进行加权；最后通过共享轨迹级基线统一两类信号，生成正向token权重以调整相对更新幅度。
AI.result: 在多种多模态推理基准上的实验表明，SRPO显著提升了基于证据的推理能力，验证了从统一序列级信用分配转向角色感知优化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SRPO揭示了在多模态强化学习推理中，超越序列级信用分配、引入角色感知优化对于实现可靠的多模态推理至关重要，且该方法无需外部奖励模型或独立教师模型，具有良好的实用性和扩展性。

title: GazeVLM: Active Vision via Internal Attention Control for Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Human visual reasoning is governed by active vision, a process where metacognitive control drives top-down goal-directed attention, dynamically routing foveal focus toward task-relevant details while maintaining peripheral awareness of the global scene. In contrast, modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs) process visual information passively, relying on the static accumulation of massive token contexts that dilute spatial reasoning and induce linguistic hallucinations. Here we propose the following paradigm shift: GazeVLM, a multimodal architecture that internalizes this metacognitive oversight over its deployment of attention resources directly into the reasoning loop. By empowering the VLM to autonomously generate gaze tokens ($\texttt{<LOOK>}$), GazeVLM establishes a top-down control mechanism over its own causal attention mask. The model dynamically dictates its focal intent, triggering a continuous suppression bias that dampens irrelevant visual features, implementing spatial selective attention and simulating foveal fixation. Once local reasoning concludes, the bias lifts, seamlessly restoring the global view. This architecture enables the model to fluidly transition between global spatial awareness and localized focal reasoning without relying on external agentic contraptions like cropping tools, or inflating the context window with additional visual tokens derived from localized visual patches. Trained with a bespoke Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) procedure that rewards valid grounding, our 4B-parameter GazeVLM delivers strong high-resolution multimodal reasoning performance, surpassing state-of-the-art VLMs in its parameter class by nearly 4% and agentic multimodal pipelines built around thinking with images by more than 5% on HRBench-4k and HRBench-8k.

AI.tldr: GazeVLM提出了一种内化元认知注意力控制的视觉语言模型架构，通过自主生成凝视令牌（\texttt{<LOOK>}）建立自顶向下的因果注意力掩码控制机制，在无需外部裁剪工具或扩展上下文窗口的前提下，实现全局场景感知与局部聚焦推理的流畅切换，在HRBench-4k和HRBench-8k基准上超越同参数级别的最新VLM近4%。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）被动处理视觉信息，依赖静态积累的大量令牌上下文，这稀释了空间推理能力并引发语言幻觉，缺乏人类主动视觉中元认知控制驱动的自上而下目标导向注意力机制。
AI.method: GazeVLM是一种多模态架构，使VLM能够自主生成凝视令牌（\texttt{<LOOK>}），建立对自身因果注意力掩码的自顶向下控制机制，通过持续抑制偏置动态地抑制无关视觉特征以实现空间选择性注意力并模拟中央凹注视，局部推理结束后偏置解除以恢复全局视图，并采用定制化的组相对策略优化（GRPO）程序进行训练以奖励有效定位。
AI.result: 4B参数的GazeVLM在HRBench-4k和HRBench-8k基准上，超越了同参数级别的最新VLM近4%，并比基于思维链图像构建的智能体多模态管线高出超过5%。
AI.conclusion: GazeVLM通过将元认知注意力控制直接内化到推理循环中，为VLM实现主动视觉提供了一种无需外部工具或膨胀上下文窗口的新范式，显著提升了高分辨率多模态推理性能。

title: GPO-V: Jailbreak Diffusion Vision Language Model by Global Probability Optimization
summary: Diffusion Vision-Language Models (dVLMs), built upon the non-causal foundations of Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs), have demonstrated remarkable efficacy in multimodal tasks by departing from the traditional autoregressive generation paradigm. While dVLMs appear inherently robust against conventional jailbreak tactics, which we categorize as Fixed Prefix Optimization (FPO) (e.g., anchoring responses with "Sure, here is"), this perceived resilience is deceptive. Our investigation into the safety landscape of dVLMs reveals a unique refusal pattern: Immediate Refusal and Progressive Refusal. We find that while FPO-based attacks often fail by triggering the latter, the progressive refinement process itself uncovers a novel, latent attack surface. To exploit this vulnerability, we propose Global Probability Optimization (GPO), a general jailbreak paradigm designed specifically for the denoising trajectory of masked diffusion models. Unlike prefix-based methods, GPO manipulates the global generative dynamics to bypass guardrails in diffusion language models. Building on this, we introduce GPO-V, the first visual-modality jailbreak framework tailored for dVLMs. Empirical results demonstrate that GPO-V produces stealthy perturbations with exceptional cross-model transferability, revealing a critical security gap in non-sequential generative architectures. Our findings underscore the critical urgency of addressing safety alignment in dVLMs. These results necessitate an immediate and fundamental re-evaluation of current defense paradigms to mitigate the unique risks of diffusion-based generation. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/GPO-V-0250.

AI.tldr: 本文首次揭示了基于非自回归扩散机制的视觉-语言模型（dVLMs）在面对传统越狱攻击时表现出的虚假鲁棒性，并提出了一种针对扩散模型去噪轨迹的新型越狱范式——全局概率优化（GPO）及其视觉模态扩展GPO-V，实验表明该方法能够生成具有高跨模型迁移性的隐蔽扰动，揭示了扩散生成架构中存在关键安全漏洞。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明扩散视觉-语言模型（dVLMs）似乎对传统越狱攻击（如固定前缀优化FPO）具有天然鲁棒性，但这种鲁棒性是虚假的。作者发现dVLMs存在独特的拒绝模式（即时拒绝与渐进式拒绝），且渐进式精炼过程本身暴露出一种潜在的对抗攻击面，亟需系统性地揭示并利用这一安全漏洞。
AI.method: 作者首先将传统越狱攻击归纳为固定前缀优化（FPO）范式，并分析了dVLMs的拒绝模式。在此基础上，提出了全局概率优化（GPO）——一种针对掩码扩散模型去噪轨迹的通用越狱范式，通过操纵全局生成动态而非前缀来绕过安全护栏。进一步地，作者将GPO扩展为GPO-V，这是首个专门针对dVLMs的视觉模态越狱框架。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，GPO-V能够生成具有高度隐蔽性的视觉扰动，并且展现出卓越的跨模型迁移能力，在非序列生成架构中成功揭示了关键的安全缺口。
AI.conclusion: 该研究强调了在dVLMs中解决安全对齐问题的紧迫性，指出当前基于自回归范式的防御机制无法有效防御针对扩散模型的越狱攻击，需要从根本上重新评估和设计面向扩散生成架构的安全防御范式。

title: SOM: Structured Opponent Modeling for LLM-based Agents via Structural Causal Model
summary: Accurately predicting opponents' behavior from interactions is a fundamental capability for large language model (LLM)-based agents in multi-agent and game-theoretic environments. Existing approaches often entangle opponent modeling with prediction, relying on implicit contextual reasoning and limiting adaptability in dynamic interactions. To this end, we propose Structured Opponent Modeling (SOM), a two-stage opponent modeling framework that distinctly separates opponent model construction and opponent prediction. At the construction stage, SOM employs a Structural Causal Model (SCM), a graph-based formalism for representing dependencies among variables, to capture directed links between opponents' observations and actions, yielding an explicit and structured opponent representation. At the prediction stage, the LLM performs structured reasoning along clear pathways derived from the SCM, improving both prediction accuracy and stability. Extensive experiments on diverse multi-agent benchmarks demonstrate that SOM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art LLM-based reasoning baselines, enabling more accurate and adaptable strategic decision-making in complex and dynamic multi-agent interactions.

AI.tldr: 提出结构化对手建模（SOM）框架，通过结构因果模型（SCM）将对手模型构建与预测分离，使LLM在多智能体博弈环境中实现更准确和稳定的对手行为预测与战略决策。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的对手建模方法通常将对手建模与预测纠缠在一起，依赖隐式的上下文推理，在动态交互中适应性受限，缺乏明确的结构化对手表示来指导预测过程。
AI.method: SOM采用两阶段框架：在对手模型构建阶段，使用结构因果模型（SCM）以图形式化方法捕获对手观测与行动之间的有向依赖关系，生成显式结构化的对手表示；在预测阶段，LLM沿着SCM导出的清晰路径进行结构化推理，提升预测准确性与稳定性。
AI.result: 在多种多智能体基准测试上的大量实验表明，SOM在对手行为预测和适应性战略决策方面一致优于最先进的基于LLM的推理基线方法，在复杂动态多智能体交互中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: SOM通过显式解耦对手模型构建与预测过程，为LLM在多智能体博弈中的对手建模提供了更结构化、可解释且稳健的范式，具有提升复杂动态环境下智能体战略决策能力的潜力。

title: Discovering Ordinary Differential Equations with LLM-Based Qualitative and Quantitative Evaluation
summary: Discovering governing differential equations from observational data is a fundamental challenge in scientific machine learning. Existing symbolic regression approaches rely primarily on quantitative metrics; however, real-world differential equation modeling also requires incorporating domain knowledge to ensure physical plausibility. To address this gap, we propose DoLQ, a method for discovering ordinary differential equations with LLM-based qualitative and quantitative evaluation. DoLQ employs a multi-agent architecture: a Sampler Agent proposes dynamic system candidates, a Parameter Optimizer refines equations for accuracy, and a Scientist Agent leverages an LLM to conduct both qualitative and quantitative evaluations and synthesize their results to iteratively guide the search. Experiments on multi-dimensional ordinary differential equation benchmarks demonstrate that DoLQ achieves superior performance compared to existing methods, not only attaining higher success rates but also more accurately recovering the correct symbolic terms of ground truth equations. Our code is available at https://github.com/Bon99yun/DoLQ.

AI.tldr: DoLQ 提出一种基于 LLM 多智能体架构的符号回归方法，通过定性与定量联合评估来发现常微分方程，在多个基准上取得了更高的成功率和更准确的符号项恢复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于符号回归的微分方程发现方法主要依赖定量指标，难以融入领域知识以确保结果的物理合理性，亟需一种能结合定性与定量评估的框架来弥补这一不足。
AI.method: DoLQ 采用多智能体架构：Sampler Agent 负责提出动态系统候选方程，Parameter Optimizer 对候选方程进行参数优化以提高拟合精度，Scientist Agent 利用 LLM 同时进行定性（物理合理性）和定量（数据拟合误差）评估，并综合两种评估结果迭代引导搜索过程。
AI.result: 在多维常微分方程基准测试上，DoLQ 相比现有方法不仅获得了更高的方程发现成功率，还能更准确地恢复出真实方程中的正确符号项。
AI.conclusion: 将 LLM 的语义理解能力引入符号回归，通过定性与定量联合评估机制，能有效提升微分方程发现的物理合理性和准确性，为该领域提供了一种新的可行范式。

title: EditRefiner: A Human-Aligned Agentic Framework for Image Editing Refinement
summary: Recent text-guided image editing (TIE) models have made remarkable progress, yet edited images still frequently suffer from fine-grained issues such as unnatural objects, lighting mismatch, and unexpected changes. Existing refinement approaches either rely on costly iterative regeneration or employ vision-language models (VLMs) with weak spatial grounding, often resulting in semantic drift and unreliable local corrections. To address these limitations, we first construct EditFHF-15K, a dataset of fine-grained human feedback for edited images, comprising (1) 15K images from 12 TIE models spanning 43 editing tasks, (2) 60K annotated artifact regions and 80K editing failure regions, each accompanied by textual reasoning, and (3) 45K mean opinion scores (MOSs) assessing perceptual quality, instruction following, and visual consistency. Based on EditFHF-15K, we propose EditRefiner, a hierarchical, interpretable, and human-aligned agentic framework that reformulates post-editing correction as a human-like perception-reasoning-action-evaluation loop. Specifically, we introduce: (1) a perception agent that detects contextual saliency maps of artifacts and editing failures, (2) a reasoning agent that interprets these perceptual cues to perform human-aligned diagnostic inference, (3) an action agent that uses the reasoning output to plan and execute localized re-editing, and (4) an evaluation agent that assesses the re-edited image and guides the action agent on whether further refinements are required. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EditRefiner consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in distortion localization, diagnose accuracy and human perception alignment, establishing a new paradigm for self-corrective and perceptually reliable image editing. The code is available at https://github.com/IntMeGroup/EditRefiner.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了细粒度人工反馈数据集 EditFHF-15K，并提出 EditRefiner 层次化智能体框架，将图像编辑后修正重塑为类人的感知-推理-行动-评估循环，在失真定位、诊断准确性和人类感知对齐方面显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有文本引导图像编辑模型虽进展显著，但编辑图像仍常出现物体不自然、光照不匹配和意外变化等细粒度问题；已有的精炼方法要么依赖高代价的迭代重生成，要么使用空间定位能力弱的视觉-语言模型，导致语义漂移和不可靠的局部修正。
AI.method: 首先构建 EditFHF-15K 数据集，包含来自 12 个 TIE 模型在 43 个编辑任务上的 15K 图像、60K 标注伪影区域、80K 编辑失败区域及对应的文本推理、45K 平均意见评分；在此基础上提出 EditRefiner，一个层次化、可解释、与人类对齐的智能体框架，包含四个智能体：感知智能体检测伪影和编辑失败的上下文显著图，推理智能体进行类人诊断推断，行动智能体规划并执行局部重编辑，评估智能体评估结果并决定是否需要进一步精炼。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，EditRefiner 在失真定位、诊断准确性和人类感知对齐方面持续优于现有最先进方法，建立了自纠正且感知可靠的图像编辑新范式。
AI.conclusion: EditRefiner 通过构建细粒度人工反馈数据集和类人智能体循环，有效解决了编辑后图像的细粒度质量问题，为可解释、可自纠正的图像编辑后修正提供了新的技术范式，代码已开源。

title: Tools as Continuous Flow for Evolving Agentic Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in orchestrating tools for reasoning tasks. However, existing methods rely on a step-wise paradigm that lacks a global perspective, which causes error accumulation over long horizons and restricts generalization to unseen tools. To overcome these limitations, we propose Tools as Continuous Flow for Evolving Agentic Reasoning (FlowAgent), which reconceptualizes tool chaining as continuous trajectory generation within a semantic space. To systematically evaluate this paradigm, we introduce the first plan-level closed-loop benchmark dedicated to plan-level agentic reasoning in dynamic real-world environments. Specifically, the proposed FlowAgent leverages conditional flow matching to generate continuous latent trajectories, providing a global planning perspective to ensure coherent and robust tool execution. Theoretically, we establish formal bounds on utility convergence and prove that our continuous formulation fundamentally guarantees robust generalization and error attenuation. Empirical evaluations show that FlowAgent achieves superior robustness and adaptability in long-horizon reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出FlowAgent框架，将工具链推理重定义为语义空间中的连续轨迹生成，利用条件流匹配实现全局规划视角，在长时程推理任务中展现出更优的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的工具编排方法依赖逐步（step-wise）范式，缺乏全局视角，导致在长时程任务中存在误差累积问题，且难以泛化到未见过的工具。
AI.method: 提出FlowAgent框架，将工具链推理重概念化为语义空间中的连续轨迹生成，利用条件流匹配（conditional flow matching）生成连续的隐空间轨迹，以全局规划视角确保工具执行的连贯性和鲁棒性；同时引入首个面向规划级智能体推理的闭环基准测试。
AI.result: 理论分析建立了效用收敛的正式界，并证明连续形式化方法能够保证鲁棒泛化和误差衰减；实证评估表明FlowAgent在长时程推理任务中具有优异的鲁棒性和适应性。
AI.conclusion: 连续轨迹生成范式可有效克服逐步推理中的误差累积问题，为长时程、动态环境下的智能体推理提供了一种兼具理论保障和实践有效性的新途径。

title: ForgeVLA: Federated Vision-Language-Action Learning without Language Annotations
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models hold great promise for general-purpose robotic intelligence, yet scaling up such models is severely bottlenecked by the high cost of acquiring annotated training data. Fortunately, vision-equipped robots deployed across various domains already produce abundant vision-action pairs that can be leveraged to scale up VLA training more efficiently. However, these raw data cannot be centrally aggregated due to various constraints and also exhibit severe heterogeneity. To address these challenges, in this paper, we propose ForgeVLA, a federated VLA training framework that learns VLA models from distributed vision-action pairs without centralizing raw data or requiring manual annotations. Specifically, each client in ForgeVLA is equipped with an embodied instruction classifier that maps vision-action pairs to a predefined instruction set, recovering the missing language modality and forming complete vision-language-action triplets. Beyond triplet construction, we also identify vision-language feature collapse as a critical challenge that has been largely overlooked in prior federated VLA research. To mitigate this issue, ForgeVLA combines a client-side contrastive planning loss with a server-side adaptive aggregation strategy to learn task-discriminative representations efficiently. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks show that ForgeVLA significantly outperforms other baselines, and ablation studies further validate the contribution of each component.

AI.tldr: ForgeVLA提出了一种联邦学习框架，用于从分布式的、无标注的视觉-动作数据中训练VLA模型，通过嵌入指令分类器恢复缺失的语言模态，并设计对比规划损失和自适应聚合策略缓解视觉-语言特征坍塌问题，显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: VLA模型的规模化训练严重受限于人工标注数据的高昂成本，而实际部署的机器人虽能产生大量视觉-动作数据，但这些数据因隐私、监管等约束无法集中聚合，且存在严重的异构性（如不同的任务、环境、机器人形态），同时缺失语言模态的标注，导致难以直接用于VLA训练。
AI.method: ForgeVLA采用联邦学习范式，使各客户端在本地训练VLA模型而不共享原始数据；每个客户端配备一个具身指令分类器，将视觉-动作对映射到预定义的指令集以自动恢复语言模态，从而构建完整的视觉-语言-动作三元组；针对视觉-语言特征坍塌这一关键问题，提出客户端侧的对比规划损失（contrastive planning loss）与服务端侧的自适应聚合策略，以学习任务判别性表示并实现高效聚合。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的实验表明，ForgeVLA显著优于其他基线方法；消融实验进一步验证了具身指令分类器、对比规划损失和自适应聚合策略各自对整体性能的贡献。
AI.conclusion: ForgeVLA证明了在无需集中原始数据和人工标注的条件下，通过联邦学习从分布式异构视觉-动作数据中高效训练VLA模型的可行性，为解决机器人学习中数据规模化瓶颈提供了新思路，并揭示了视觉-语言特征坍塌在联邦VLA场景中的关键影响。

title: LiteGUI: Distilling Compact GUI Agents with Reinforcement Learning
summary: Developing lightweight, on-device vision-language GUI agents is essential for efficient cross-platform automated interaction. However, current on-device agents are constrained by limited model capacity, and further performance improvements remain urgently needed. Traditional Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for small-scale models often leads to overfitting, catastrophic forgetting and policy rigidity, and thus fails to fully address these challenges. In this work, we propose a novel SFT-free training paradigm that significantly enhances the performance of small-scale models. We first present the initial systematic integration of generalized knowledge distillation into the GUI agent domain via Guided On-policy Distillation. By incorporating oracle reference trajectories together with a dynamic retrieval mechanism, our method reduces hallucinations and mitigates the cognitive misalignment inherent in multi-solution GUI tasks. Building on this foundation, we further introduce a Multi-solution Dual-level GRPO framework that jointly aligns macro-level subtask planning with micro-level execution matching, thereby improving exploration in long-horizon GUI agent scenarios. In addition, we construct an automated data generation pipeline to synthesize GUI task trajectories with rich multi-solution annotations. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance among lightweight models while remaining competitive with substantially larger-scale models across all benchmarks. Ablation studies further demonstrate that structured on-policy distillation and multi-solution dual-level exploration can fully unlock the capabilities of 2B/3B scale agents, surpassing the performance limits of conventional imitation learning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需监督微调（SFT-free）的训练范式，通过引导式在策略知识蒸馏和多解双层GRPO框架显著提升轻量级GUI智能体性能，使2B/3B规模模型在所有基准测试中达到SOTA，并与大规模模型竞争。
AI.motivation: 当前的轻量级设备上视觉语言GUI智能体受限于模型容量，需要进一步提升性能；传统监督微调（SFT）在小规模模型上容易导致过拟合、灾难性遗忘和策略僵化，无法有效解决上述挑战。
AI.method: 提出了一种无SFT的训练范式，首先通过引导式在策略蒸馏（Guided On-policy Distillation）将知识蒸馏系统性地引入GUI智能体领域，结合oracle参考轨迹和动态检索机制减少幻觉并缓解多解GUI任务中的认知错位；在此基础上进一步提出多解双层GRPO框架（Multi-solution Dual-level GRPO），联合对齐宏观层面的子任务规划与微观层面的执行匹配，增强长时序GUI场景中的探索能力；同时构建了自动化数据生成管线，合成带有丰富多解标注的GUI任务轨迹。
AI.result: 该方法在轻量级模型中达到了最优性能（SOTA），并在所有基准测试中与规模更大的模型保持竞争力；消融实验表明，结构化在策略蒸馏和多解双层探索能够充分释放2B/3B规模智能体的能力，超越传统模仿学习的性能极限。
AI.conclusion: 结构化在策略蒸馏与多解双层探索可以完全解锁小规模GUI智能体的潜力，无SFT的训练范式相比传统模仿学习具有显著优势，为轻量级设备上GUI智能体的性能提升提供了有效新路径。

title: How Far Is Document Parsing from Solved? PureDocBench: A Source-TraceableBenchmark across Clean, Degraded, and Real-World Settings
summary: The past year has seen over 20 open-source document parsing models, yet thefield still benchmarks almost exclusively on OmniDocBench, a 1,355-pagemanually annotated dataset whose top scores have saturated above 90%. Athree-stage audit pipeline we run on OmniDocBench screens its 21,353evaluator-scored blocks and confirms 2,580 errors (12.08%); combined with overa year of public availability, both annotation quality and contamination riskcall its rankings into question. To address these issues, we presentPureDocBench, a programmatically generated, source-traceable benchmark thatrenders document images from HTML/CSS and produces verifiable annotations fromthe same source, covering 10 domains, 66 subcategories, and 1,475 pages, eachin three versions: clean, digitally degraded, and real-degraded (4,425 imagestotal). Evaluating 40 models spanning pipeline specialists, end-to-endspecialists, and general-purpose VLMs, we find: (i) document parsing is farfrom solved: the best model scores only ~74 out of 100, with a 44.6-point gapbetween the strongest and weakest models; (ii) specialist parsers with <=4Bparameters rival or surpass general VLMs that are 5-100x larger, yet formularecognition remains a shared bottleneck where no model exceeds 67% whenaveraging the formula metric across all three tracks; (iii) general VLMs loseonly 0.99/8.52 Overall points under digital/real degradation versus 4.90/14.21for pipeline specialists, producing ranking reversals that make clean-onlyevaluation misleading for deployment. All data, code, and artifacts arepublicly released.

AI.tldr: PureDocBench 是一个程序化生成、来源可追溯的文档解析基准，通过 HTML/CSS 渲染文档图像并生成可验证标注，覆盖 66 个子类别共 4,425 张图像；在 40 个模型上的评估表明，文档解析远未解决（最佳模型约 74 分），小参数专用解析器可匹敌大模型，但公式识别是共同瓶颈，且真实退化下通用 VLM 与专用解析器的排名反转使仅基于干净数据的评估具有误导性。
AI.motivation: 现有的文档解析基准 OmniDocBench 主要依赖 1,355 页的人工标注数据集，顶部得分已饱和超过 90%；经三阶段审计发现其 21,353 个评估块中有 2,580 个错误（12.08%），且经过一年多的公开，标注质量与污染风险使排名可信度受损，亟需更可靠、可追溯的基准。
AI.method: PureDocBench 通过 HTML/CSS 程序化生成文档图像，并从同一来源产生可验证的标注，覆盖 10 个领域、66 个子类别、1,475 页，每页包含干净、数字退化、真实退化三个版本共 4,425 张图像；在此基础上评估了 40 个模型，涵盖管道专用解析器、端到端专用解析器和通用视觉语言模型三类。
AI.result: 最佳模型得分仅约 74/100，最强与最弱模型间差距达 44.6 分；参数量不超过 4B 的专用解析器可匹敌或超越规模大 5-100 倍的通用 VLM，但公式识别是共同瓶颈（所有模型在三类退化上平均公式识别得分均未超过 67%）；通用 VLM 在数字/真实退化下仅损失 0.99/8.52 总体分，而管道专用解析器损失达 4.90/14.21，导致排名反转。
AI.conclusion: 文档解析任务远未解决，小参数量专用模型在干净场景下具有竞争力，但公式识别是关键短板；仅基于干净数据的评估会误导实际部署选择，因为不同模型对退化的鲁棒性差异巨大，考虑退化情况的评估对真实场景应用至关重要。

title: Model-Driven Policy Optimization in Differentiable Simulators via Stochastic Exploration
summary:
Differentiable planning enables gradient-based optimization of decision-making problems by leveraging differentiable models of system dynamics. However, in highly nonlinear and hybrid discrete-continuous domains, the resulting optimization landscapes are often ill-conditioned, with flat regions and sharp transitions that hinder effective optimization.
  We propose Model-Driven Policy Optimization (MDPO), a framework that introduces stochastic exploration into differentiable planning by injecting noise into the action space during optimization. Leveraging access to the model, MDPO further adapts the noise magnitude based on gradient-derived sensitivity of the trajectory objective, yielding a time-dependent exploration profile. This enables improved exploration of the objective landscape and helps escape poor local optima via dynamic allocation of exploration across timesteps and iterations.
  Experiments on benchmark domains demonstrate that MDPO consistently outperforms deterministic differentiable planning, including both the noise-free variant of our method and available state-of-the-art implementations, as well as model-free baselines such as PPO, significantly improving solution quality across challenging nonlinear and hybrid settings. We further analyze the evolution of the adaptive noise magnitude across both time steps and optimization iterations, providing insight into how exploration is allocated during learning.

AI.tldr: 提出模型驱动策略优化（MDPO）框架，通过在可微规划的动作空间中注入自适应噪声来改善高度非线性和混合离散-连续决策问题中的优化景观，实验表明其显著优于确定性可微规划和无模型基线方法。
AI.motivation: 可微规划在高度非线性和混合离散-连续决策域中面临优化景观病态问题，存在平坦区域和尖锐过渡，阻碍梯度基优化方法有效求解。
AI.method: MDPO框架在可微规划的动作空间中注入噪声以引入随机探索，并利用模型访问能力根据轨迹目标的梯度敏感性动态调整噪声幅度，生成时变探索剖面，实现跨时间步和迭代的动态探索分配。
AI.result: 在基准测试中，MDPO在挑战性非线性和混合设置下持续优于确定性可微规划（包括无噪声变体和现有最先进实现）以及PPO等无模型基线，显著提升了求解质量。
AI.conclusion: 自适应噪声幅度在时间步和优化迭代中的演化分析揭示了学习过程中的探索分配机制，表明动态分配探索有助于逃离局部较差最优，提升了可微规划在复杂决策问题中的实用性。

title: DIMoE-Adapters: Dynamic Expert Evolution for Continual Learning in Vision-Language Models
summary: Continual learning enables vision-language models to accumulate knowledge and adapt to evolving tasks without retraining from scratch. However, in multi-domain task-incremental learning, large domain shifts intensify the stability-plasticity dilemma. Most existing methods rely on fixed architectures with statically allocated parameters, which limits adaptation to new domains and aggravates catastrophic forgetting. To address these challenges, we propose DIMoE-Adapters, a Dynamic Incremental Mixture-of-Experts Adapters framework that introduces a dynamic expert evolution paradigm to balance stability and plasticity. This paradigm is implemented through two collaborative components: Self-Calibrated Expert Evolution (SCEE) and Prototype-Guided Expert Selection (PGES). SCEE constructs and evolves a sparse expert pool through expert optimization dynamics, improving plasticity while reducing redundant capacity. PGES controls expert utilization based on the pool shaped by SCEE, improving stability across both previously encountered and unseen tasks. Extensive experiments show that DIMoE-Adapters outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods across various settings.

AI.tldr: 提出DIMoE-Adapters框架，通过动态增量混合专家适配器（包含自校准专家演化和原型引导专家选择）来平衡视觉-语言模型在多领域任务增量学习中的稳定性与可塑性，在多种设置下超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法在多领域任务增量学习中面临大领域偏移加剧的稳定性-可塑性困境，大多数方法依赖固定架构和静态参数分配，限制了模型对新领域的适应能力并加剧了灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 提出DIMoE-Adapters框架，核心是一种动态专家演化范式，包含两个协同组件：自校准专家演化（SCEE）通过专家优化动力学构建并演化稀疏专家池，提升可塑性的同时减少冗余容量；原型引导专家选择（PGES）基于SCEE塑造的专家池控制专家利用率，增强在面对已见和未见任务时的稳定性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，DIMoE-Adapters在多种设置下均优于此前的最先进方法，验证了其在多领域任务增量学习中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态专家演化机制能够有效平衡持续学习中的稳定性与可塑性，通过稀疏专家池的构建与自适应选择，在不增加冗余容量的前提下提升了模型对新旧任务的泛化能力。

title: From Feasible to Practical: Pareto-Optimal Synthesis Planning
summary: Current computer-aided synthesis planning (CASP) methods often treat retrosynthesis as solved once a single feasible route is identified, focusing primarily on convergence or shortest-path metrics. This view is misaligned with real-world practice, where chemists must balance competing objectives such as cost, sustainability, toxicity, and overall yield. To address this, we formulate synthesis planning as a multi-objective search problem and introduce MORetro*, an algorithm that generates a Pareto front of synthesis routes to explicitly capture trade-offs among user-defined criteria. MORetro* uses weighted scalarization and BO-informed sampling to efficiently navigate the combinatorial search space and prioritize promising trade-offs. Building on multi-objective A*-search, we provide optimality guarantees showing that, for a fixed single-step model, MORetro* recovers the true Pareto front. Across multiple retrosynthesis benchmarks, MORetro* produces diverse, high-quality Pareto fronts, uncovering solutions overlooked by single-objective approaches and better aligning CASP outputs with industrial decision-making.

AI.tldr: MORetro* 将逆合成规划建模为多目标搜索问题，通过加权标量化和贝叶斯优化采样生成帕累托前沿，在多个基准上展现了优于单目标方法的多样性路线，更贴合工业决策需求。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机辅助逆合成规划（CASP）方法通常将找到一条可行路线视为任务完成，仅关注收敛性或最短路径等单一指标，这与化学工业实践中需要同时权衡成本、可持续性、毒性和总收率等多重目标的真实需求严重脱节。
AI.method: MORetro* 将逆合成规划形式化为多目标搜索问题，基于多目标 A* 搜索框架，引入加权标量化策略将多目标化为单目标以引导搜索方向，并利用贝叶斯优化（BO）驱动的采样方法高效探索组合搜索空间、优先发现具有良好折衷性质的合成路线，最终生成显式表征各目标间权衡关系的帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 在多个逆合成基准数据集上，MORetro* 生成了多样且高质量的帕累托前沿，能够发现被单目标方法遗漏的合成路线，从而在目标空间覆盖度、路线多样性等方面显著超越传统单目标方法。理论分析证明，在固定单步逆合成模型的前提下，MORetro* 可保证恢复真实的帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: MORetro* 通过引入多目标优化视角为逆合成规划提供了与工业决策更契合的解决方案，证明了在合成路线搜索中显式处理目标间权衡是可行且有效的，有望推动 CASP 系统从“寻路”范式向“权衡决策支持”范式转变。

title: From Pixels to Prompts: Vision-Language Models
summary: When you read a paper about a new Vision-Language Model today, it can be easy to forget how strange this idea would have sounded not so long ago. Teaching machines to see was already hard. Teaching them to read and generate language was already hard. Asking them to do both at once - and then to reason, answer questions, follow instructions, and sometimes even surprise us - still carries a quiet trace of science fiction, even as it becomes routine. This book was born from a simple feeling: \emph{it is too easy to get lost}. The field moves quickly, new model names appear constantly, and the gap between ``I know the buzzwords'' and ``I actually understand how this works'' can feel uncomfortably wide. I have felt that gap many times. If you are holding this book, you probably have too. My goal is not to provide an exhaustive catalog of every dataset, benchmark, and new model variant. Instead, I want to offer something more modest - and, I hope, more durable: a clear mental map of Vision-Language Models. Enough structure that you can read new papers with confidence; enough intuition that you can design your own systems without feeling as if you are assembling LEGO bricks blindly.

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为视觉-语言模型（VLM）领域提供一套清晰的思维框架而非详尽的技术目录，帮助读者在快速发展的领域中获得深层理解，从而能够自信地阅读前沿论文并自主设计系统。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型领域发展极为迅速，新模型层出不穷，导致研究者（尤其是初学者）很容易在该领域迷失方向。作者指出，当前存在一种令人不安的脱节：了解行业术语与真正理解底层工作原理之间存在巨大鸿沟。现有资源往往偏向于罗列数据集、基准和模型变种，缺乏能够帮助读者建立系统性认知的持久性知识结构。
AI.method: 本文不提出新的模型或算法，而是采用知识体系化的方法：通过构建一个清晰的"思维地图"（mental map）来组织视觉-语言模型的核心概念、架构范式和设计原则。该地图旨在提供足够的结构化知识，使读者能够自信地理解新论文，并培养足够的直觉来自主设计VLM系统，而非像盲目拼装乐高积木般操作。
AI.result: 本文作为一本专著而非研究论文，没有提供具体的实验指标或基准测试结果。其核心成果是一种认知框架的构建——弥合了从"知道术语"到"真正理解原理"之间的认知差距，使读者能够在快速变化的领域中建立持久的、可迁移的理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文的核心洞见在于：在技术快速迭代的AI领域，相比提供随时可能过时的详尽技术清单，构建可迁移的思维框架和价值定位具有更持久的价值。理解视觉-语言模型的关键不在于记忆每个新模型的名称，而在于掌握其背后的设计逻辑和共性原理，这才能让研究者具备独立设计和批判性分析的能力。

title: Hierarchical Dual-Subspace Decoupling for Continual Learning in Vision-Language Models
summary: Class-incremental learning aims to continuously acquire new knowledge while preserving previously learned information, thereby mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Existing methods primarily restrict parameter updates but often overlook their structural properties in high-dimensional spaces. From a subspace perspective, updates induced by different tasks tend to lie in multiple overlapping low-rank subspaces, leading to cross-task subspace interference and severe forgetting. To address this issue, we propose HDSD, a Hierarchical Dual-Subspace Decoupling framework for continual learning in vision-language models. Specifically, we introduce a lightweight Feature Modulation Module (FMM) that explicitly decomposes the parameter space into general and task-specific subspaces. Building on this design, we develop two complementary components. First, a General Fusion Module (GFM) evaluates relative parameter changes across tasks and uses an adaptive threshold to capture stable and transferable knowledge. Second, a Hierarchical Learning Module (HLM) performs structured parameter decomposition via Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) and uses a scaling mechanism to constrain updates within distinct subspace scales. Together, these designs reduce subspace interference and parameter drift. Extensive experiments on conventional benchmarks show that HDSD achieves state-of-the-art results.

AI.tldr: 提出HDSD框架，通过分层双子空间解耦机制将参数空间分解为通用与任务特定子空间，结合通用融合模块和层次学习模块减少子空间干扰，在视觉语言模型的类增量学习中达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有类增量学习方法主要通过限制参数更新来缓解灾难性遗忘，但忽视了参数在高维空间中的结构特性；不同任务产生的更新往往位于多个重叠的低秩子空间中，导致跨任务子空间干扰和严重遗忘。
AI.method: 提出分层双子空间解耦（HDSD）框架，包含三个关键组件：轻量级特征调制模块（FMM）将参数空间显式分解为通用与任务特定子空间；通用融合模块（GFM）评估跨任务参数相对变化并采用自适应阈值捕获稳定可迁移知识；层次学习模块（HLM）通过奇异值分解（SVD）进行结构化参数分解并利用缩放机制约束不同子空间尺度内的更新。
AI.result: 在多个常规基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，HDSD方法在类增量学习任务上达到了最先进（state-of-the-art）的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式解耦通用与任务特定子空间并约束子空间尺度内的参数更新，HDSD有效减少了子空间干扰和参数漂移，为视觉语言模型中的持续学习提供了新的结构化参数管理范式。

title: Parallel Lifted Planning via Semi-Naive Datalog Evaluation
summary: Lifted classical planners operate directly on first-order planning tasks to avoid the computationally demanding grounding step. However, lifted planning is typically slower, as planners must repeatedly instantiate ground structures during search. Many core components of lifted classical planning, such as successor generation, axiom evaluation, task grounding, and delete-relaxed heuristics, have previously been studied through the lens of Datalog evaluation. We build upon this line of work and extend it by developing and analyzing an execution model with two levels of parallelism: rule-level parallelism and grounding parallelism. We further specialize this solver for planning-specific workloads with a grounder based on clique enumeration, which we extend to support semi-naive Datalog evaluation. Our experimental evaluation using greedy best-first search with the FF heuristic shows that our implementation already solves more tasks than the baselines on a single core, and the gap widens as additional cores are used. Moreover, on hard-to-ground tasks where on average 97.6% of the total runtime is spent in Datalog execution, the proposed execution model exhibits an average parallel fraction of 92.4%, while achieving up to a 6-fold speedup on 8 cores in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Datalog评估的双层并行执行模型，用于加速提升式经典规划。该方法结合基于团枚举的半朴素Datalog地面化器，在单核上即可超越基线，且随核心数增加优势扩大，在难地面化任务上实现了8核6倍加速和92.4%的平均并行分数。
AI.motivation: 提升式经典规划虽避免了计算昂贵的显式地面化步骤，但因搜索过程中需要反复实例化地面结构而通常运行较慢。现有研究虽已利用Datalog评估分析了提升式规划的核心组件，但缺乏利用并行计算来加速该过程的系统性方法。
AI.method: 本文构建并分析了一个包含两个并行层次（规则级并行和地面化并行）的执行模型，并针对规划工作负载进行了专门优化。具体而言，提出了一种基于团枚举的地面化器，并将其扩展以支持半朴素Datalog评估，从而高效处理规划领域中的实例化任务。
AI.result: 在贪婪最佳优先搜索与FF启发式下的实验表明，该实现在单核上即可解决比基线更多的任务，且随核心数增加差距进一步扩大。在难地面化任务中（平均97.6%的运行时间用于Datalog执行），所提执行模型实现了92.4%的平均并行分数，并在8核上获得了高达6倍的加速效果。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，利用双层并行Datalog评估能够有效加速提升式经典规划，尤其是在地面化困难的领域。该工作为规划系统的并行化执行提供了可扩展的框架，并揭示了Datalog作为规划推理底层引擎的高并行潜力。

title: Probabilistic Object Detection with Conformal Prediction
summary: Conformal Prediction (CP) is a distribution-free method for constructing prediction sets with marginal finite-sample coverage guarantees, making it a suitable framework for reliable uncertainty quantification in safety-critical object detection. However, object detection introduces structured multi-output predictions, complicating the application of classical CP theory developed for single outputs. In addition, standard, unscaled CP produces fixed-width prediction intervals across inputs, leading to unnecessary width for low-uncertainty predictions. While scaled CP addresses this by adapting the interval width to an input-dependent uncertainty estimate, prior work has neither systematically compared unscaled and scaled CP for multi-class object detection, nor integrated CP with a complementary uncertainty quantification method in this setting.
